##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.
Close

# Let’s Save Money and Energy Together
## Are you a homeowner, resident, large or small business owner, or a property manager? Austin Energy empowers our customers with rebates and incentives that help lower bills and increase energy savings.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/about "Lets Save Money and Energy Together")
  * [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Home Performance with ENERGY STAR")![Home energy improvements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/Savings-homepage-image_2018-dk.jpg?rev=0bc9577241f74135851e4078ee2ab5a8&w=1520&hash=81D8044620069BAECFAA505BF0EA53FD)
#  Home Energy Savings 
## For a limited time, enjoy rebates averaging $2,600 on home energy improvements. 
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Home Performance with ENERGY STAR")
  * [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products")![Discounts on select energy efficient products at select retailers](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/SPUR-00324-banner2.jpg?rev=e49b6d57ce8a41628815bd2658bbcfc0&w=1520&hash=9519B4B1FEDBFD4CCA2D4BC3AC90EAD6)
# Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products
## Enjoy in-store discounts on select energy efficient products. View products and participating stores.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products")
  * [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/com-rebates "Save Money and Energy for Business")![commercial energy rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/homepageSlide003.jpg?rev=27a66d0b5384473c862751b579719f31&w=1520&hash=D17DA716F93C0B8B576FCF2358C5B4AE)
#  Save Money and Energy for Your Business 
## 20+ rebates available for businesses of all sizes.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/com-rebates "Save Money and Energy for Business")


[](https://savings.austinenergy.com/) [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/)
# Customer Driven. Community Focused.
## Energy Savings for Your Home, Business, or Multifamily Property
Residential
We offer residential rebates and loans for heating, air conditioning, ventilation, lighting, pools, water heaters, and more.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential "Residential")
Commercial
Our commercial rebates and incentives help you save money and energy on heating and cooling costs and appliances for your business.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial "Commercial")
Multifamily
Our multifamily rebates help you efficiently control heating, cooling, and lighting costs without compromising comfort.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily "Multifamily")
## Featured Savings
  * [![Manage Your Residential Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Manage-Your-Residential-Energy-Costs.jpg?rev=d02502f98dc94ede837738a697de97e5&w=367&hash=43F1840BD73E9F93A229EAF74D325159)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "Manage Your Residential Energy Costs")
[Manage Your Residential Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "Manage Your Residential Energy Costs")
Austin Energy offers tools to help residential customers monitor energy usage, get customized tips for saving energy, and set alerts to help avoid high bills.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "Manage Your Residential Energy Costs")
  * [![Manage Your Business Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Com-Manage-Your-Commercial-Energy-Costs.jpg?rev=da7ffd1ab0394c678921191473c0985a&w=367&hash=2D3F64D63CEAB59605081211BDA08A52)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Manage Your Business Energy Costs")
[Manage Your Business Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Manage Your Business Energy Costs")
The Austin Energy App allows business customers to monitor daily energy consumption, view bill history, and see a forecast of your next energy bill.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Manage Your Business Energy Costs")
  * [![Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR&amp;reg; Products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/MF-Save-Residents-Money-with-ENERGY-STAR-Products.jpg?rev=095db88343454f69bc00fbfa4c5ff237&w=367&hash=D6C2133054D655CA265204999285DCEF)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-energy-star "Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products")
[Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-energy-star "Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products")
Your residents will thank you when you choose energy-efficient appliances and bulbs for your rental units.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-energy-star "Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products")


![Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/hpIllustrationResized.jpg?rev=828f7b9888934409a32ac2e5edfbd35d&w=760&hash=F173C78F1B8BAA44F54F536678C747EA)
## Home Energy Savings
House 10+ years old? For a limited time, enjoy rebates averaging $2,600 plus access low-interest financing when you make whole-home energy improvements.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Home Energy Savings")
## Energy Management
Adjust Your Thermostat On The Go
If you have an Internet-connected thermostat and a smartphone, you can adjust your thermostat on the go. You can also set a personalized cooling or heating schedule for maximum comfort and minimum fuss.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/pp-thermostats "Adjust Your Thermostat On The Go")
![Adjust Your Thermostat On The Go](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/appShootResized.jpg?rev=a1669420b18d43bfad9399abe2ff174d&w=562&hash=ECCC536EE0179BACF9D1397B59FB83DB)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Manage Your Business Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Com-Manage-Your-Commercial-Energy-Costs.jpg?rev=da7ffd1ab0394c678921191473c0985a&w=780&hash=C7C5ACBE8FD1390E3419F100BB9DA8C7)
It's easy to access and monitor your business utility usage anywhere you have Internet access. You can get your bill history, too, and more.
Business customers can use the Austin Energy App to monitor daily energy usage and power factor data, view bill history, and see a forecast of their energy bill. 
With the Austin Energy App, you have the option to receive a text or email alert when you reach certain usage and demand amounts. The app also offers practical conservation tips to help you reduce your energy consumption and to save on energy costs. 
You can also download your data to [Green Button](http://www.greenbuttondata.org "Link to greenbutton.org"), which can help you better understand your energy usage and take action towards savings. 
To get started, visit [austinenergyapp.com](https://austinenergyapp.com/) and log in with your [City of Austin Utilities Online Customer Care](https://coautilities.com) username and password. 
Don’t have a username or password yet? [Register with Online Customer Care](https://coautilities.com)
###  Questions? 
Need help or have questions? Email Support

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Energy Profiler Online
## Energy Analytics for Large Commercial Customers

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Energy Profiler Online](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Com-EnergyProfilerOnline.jpg?rev=a8cf67c1a4d14346b2c7f8e74bb5d75f&w=780&hash=8CBBD8CF78CF74AB693D31C98B0AF4B5)
Get detailed reporting and load profiling for your complex business operations or multiple commercial accounts.
Energy Profiler Online is Austin Energy's free, easy-to-use cloud-based service that allows you to monitor and analyze your energy usage patterns. You can use Energy Profiler Online to get a detailed, accurate picture of your company’s energy use. It can help you identify opportunities to reduce your business’s energy consumption, increase efficiency, and save money. 
###  How Energy Profiler Online Works 
Energy Profiler Online logs your energy use data every 15 minutes, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. It then presents your energy and demand usage in easy-to-view graphs, charts, tables, and reports. The data is posted usually within 24 hours of the actual usage. 
With Energy Profiler Online, you can: 
  * Identify peak loads and analyze opportunities to reduce and shift them 
  * Discover and correct a low power factor 
  * Recognize unusual or unnecessary loads 
  * Inform operations staff to changes in equipment usage 
  * Identify high night and weekend usage 
  * Easily identify other energy inefficiencies 


###  A Solution to Fit Any Company 
Austin Energy offers two product packages to meet your needs. Both are available at no charge to our commercial customers, and both provide secure access to your business’s energy usage data. 
  * **Energy Profiler Online** **Essentials** is designed for customers who do not manage multiple sites or accounts. It provides an executive-style dashboard for users who want a clear understanding of their company’s energy consumption and associated costs. 
  * **Energy Profiler Online****Professional** is optimized for customers who track multiple accounts or multiple facilities. It provides a simple, preconfigured setup, but also gives advanced users greater flexibility to customize a dashboard for more complex business operations. 

Features  |  Essentials  |  Professional   
---|---|---  
Secure access  |  ✓  |  ✓   
Auto password recovery  |  ✓  |  ✓   
Access daily energy usage data  |  ✓  |  ✓   
Summarize stats and generate reports for total energy use, peak demand, power factor, load factor, weekday vs. weekend  |  ✓  |  ✓   
Monitor solar PV production  |  ✓  |  ✓   
Mobile Device Optimized  |  ✓  |   
Simple to use preconfigured dashboards  |  ✓  |   
Configure auto-generated reports  |  |  ✓   
Create personalized online dashboard for your most important reports  |  |  ✓   
Compare rate options  |  |  ✓   
View group accounts  |  |  ✓   
Compare energy use between multiple sites  |  |  ✓   
View historical comparison graphs  |  |  ✓   
Set maximum demand alerts  |  |  ✓   
Estimate energy costs in advance of billing  |  |  ✓   
View energy use in relation to temperature and humidity of units of production  |  |  ✓   
###  On-Site Equipment and Installation Requirements 
After you select the Energy Profiler Online package that best meets your needs, Austin Energy will verify your meter’s current interval data compatibility and set up a secure user account for you to monitor your energy usage. 
If your current meter is not compatible with Energy Profiler Online, you may request a meter upgrade. This upgrade will be scheduled with personnel at your site(s) and may require a brief outage. Once the interval meter is installed, you can securely access your company's information on the Web or mobile device and start actively managing your company’s energy load. 
###  **Sign Up Today**
Your Key Account Manager can answer any product questions and help you sign up. If you don't have an assigned Key Account Manager, email Commercial Customer Care for assistance. Please include your company name and phone number, and account number if that information is available. 
###  Already Registered? 
[Log in to Energy Profiler Online](https://core.epo.schneider-electric.com/austin/cgi/eponline.exe)
If not, contact your Key Account Manager or email Commercial Customer Care. 
###  Did You Know? 
When you use Energy Profiler Online, you can also [download your Green Button Data](http://www.greenbuttondata.org "Link to greenbutton.org")
  
For deeper analysis, you can[ENERGY STAR® Portfolio Manager](https://www.energystar.gov/buildings?testEnv=false "ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager").

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Manage Your Residential Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Manage-Your-Residential-Energy-Costs.jpg?rev=d02502f98dc94ede837738a697de97e5&w=780&hash=E1DCF9B411E103D84FBFA307C814AF6D)
It's easy to view your home electric usage anywhere you have Internet access. You can also get customized tips for saving energy and money.
[City of Austin Utilities Online Customer Care](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/home) offers detailed information on energy usage. Log in and click _Your Energy Use_ to get started and view these details: 
  * See how much energy you’ve used by the day, month, or year 
  * Compare your usage to previous time periods, or to similar households in your neighborhood 
  * View usage in dollars or in kWh 
  * See how average daily temperatures affect your bill 
  * Take the Home Energy Analysis quiz to get customized tips to save energy 
  * Download data to Green Button for further analysis 


When you log in to [City of Austin Utilities Customer Care](https://coautilities.com), you will also see a projection of your next bill. You can also set email alerts to notify you when your bill approaches a threshold of your choosing. 
Don’t have a username or password yet? [Register with Online Customer Care](https://coautilities.com)
###  Do You Have Installed Solar on Your Home? 
Austin Energy’s **Solar Insights** feature in the [City of Austin Utilities customer portal](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/home) makes it easier for residential solar customers to track energy usage and solar production—all in one place.
**What You Can Do:**
  * View solar generation and electricity use side by side
  * Explore interactive graphs and detailed billing info
  * Download and export your energy data


This streamlined experience helps you stay informed and engaged with your energy use.  

Date last reviewed or modified: 04/23/2025

# Rebates for Small to Large Businesses
## Save on Energy Efficiency Upgrades
### Rebates & Incentives
#### Commercial

    * [Commercial Kitchen Equipment](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/com-kitchen "Commercial Kitchen Equipment")

    * [EC Motor Rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/ecm "EC Motor Rebates")
    * [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heaters")

### Ways to Save
#### Commercial
  * Rebate and Financing Options![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [Rebates for Small to Large Businesses](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/com-rebates "Rebates for Small to Large Businesses")
    * [Small Business Bundled Upgrades Near Zero Cost](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/sb-bundle "	Small Business Bundled Upgrades Near Zero Cost")
    * [Financing Options](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/Financing-Options "Financing Options")
  * Manage Your Usage![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [Manage Your Business Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Manage Your Business Energy Costs")
    * [Energy Profiler Online](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/energy-profiler-online "Energy Profiler Online")


### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Collage of employees in the workplace](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Com-Rebates-for-Small-to-Large-Businesses.jpg?rev=5049e04937b14c249c3d7ffb979fb332&w=780&hash=019FF1B1064EEF26AC8CDE901AFD7419)
Earn an average rebate of $5,000 when you invest in energy efficiency for your business. 
### Small Businesses and Non-Profits
Qualifying small businesses and non-profits receive a 30% bonus over our standard [commercial rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings). Austin Energy’s rebates help small businesses install smart thermostats, upgrade appliances, and make other energy-saving improvements.
Small businesses can also enjoy instant savings on lighting upgrades. Austin Energy works with local lighting professionals to offer discounts on purchases, helping reduce your upfront costs. Our [Small Business Bundle](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/sb-bundle) can provide LED lighting, an HVAC tune-up, and smart thermostat upgrades at little to no cost.
Interested? Email Small Business Rebates to talk to an Austin Energy team member. 
Email Small Business Rebates
### Mid-Size to Large Businesses 
Mid-size to large business customers can save money and meet their energy goals with Austin Energy’s [commercial rebates and incentives](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings). More than 20 offerings are available to help businesses make smart energy choices, upgrade equipment, improve facilities, and more.
Ready to get started? Email Commercial Rebates to connect with an Austin Energy representative.
Email Commercial Rebates
### New Construction Rebates
The best time for your business to invest in energy efficiency is during a new construction project.
Contact Austin Energy at your project’s planning and design phase of your project to get the greatest possible [new construction rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/new-construction/new-construction "New Construction Rebates") for your new facility. An Austin Energy representative will help you with the application process, determine eligibility, and make recommendations.
Date last reviewed or modified: 11/19/2024

##### About Our Translations

As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。

Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

    * [Be a Power Saver](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/lower-your-usage/ps-volunteer "Be a Power Saver ")
  * Maximize Your Energy Savings![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings")
    * [Weatherization Assistance Explained](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/weatherization-explained "Weatherization Assistance Explained")


### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Save Money &amp;amp; Energy](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/saveMoneyIcon.png?rev=2b1b281496e04fe7a0a742e47063c371&w=100&hash=67157C959E7182DF29B2FC48F4EBC8D4)
Save Money & Energy
Saving energy and money go hand-in-hand. We can all contribute to reducing Austin’s energy demand by making simple lifestyle changes and energy-efficient home improvements. When demand decreases, we all save. Austin Energy is committed to helping our customers achieve the greatest savings possible.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/weatherization "Save Money & Energy")
![Weatherization assistance](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Weatherization-hero-800x560.jpg?rev=c67544808ee8449ca705605066b4f38e&w=780&hash=819DE7EA9BB4D08A74F261848F2A5FE2)
Austin Energy's Weatherization Assistance offers free home energy improvements to qualifying customers with low to moderate incomes. These improvements can help you save on monthly electric bills, improve indoor air quality, and make your home healthier and more comfortable. 
  * Description
  * Incentive
  * Eligibility
  * Enroll Now


Free home energy improvements may include: 
  * Attic insulation 
  * Repairing, replacing, and sealing ducts 
  * Sealing cracks and gaps in the walls and ceiling 
  * Sealing around doors 
  * Solar screens 
  * Carbon monoxide detectors and smoke detectors 
  * High-efficiency LED lighting 
  * Inspecting and cleaning air conditioning equipment 
  * Reflective roof coating for mobile homes 
  * Smart thermostat 


###  Interested? 
See the _Enroll Now_ tab to learn how to complete and submit the Weatherization Assistance Program Form: 
  * [Weatherization Assistance Program Form](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_english)
  * [En español: Formulario del programa de Weatherization Assistance](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_spanish)


###  Ask About Our Air Conditioning Rebate and Loan Program 
If you participate in Weatherization Assistance, Austin Energy offers a rebate and 0% financing for up to 10 years on a new air conditioning system. To learn more, talk with your Austin Energy inspector and participating contractor during your home assessment. 
###  Other Customer Assistance Programs 
The City of Austin offers the following programs to help customers facing temporary and long-term financial difficulties as well as serious medical problems: 
  * [Utility Bill Discounts](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance/utility-bill-discounts)
  * [Financial Support Plus 1](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance/plus-1)
  * [Payment Arrangements](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/payment-arrangement)
  * [Services for the Medically Vulnerable](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance/services-medically-vulnerable)


Austin Energy provides weatherization improvements at no cost to qualifying customers. 
###  Prerequisites 
  * You must be an Austin Energy customer.
  * As of March 7, 2025, eligible households must be enrolled in the [Customer Assistance Program](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance/utility-bill-discounts%20) or must be enrolled in the [Medically Vulnerable Registry](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance/services-medically-vulnerable) and meet the 80% Median Family Income requirements below.


###  Weatherization Program Income Limits
Median Income Limits  |  1-Person Household  |  2-Person Household*  |  3-Person Household  |  4-Person Household  |  5-Person Household  |  6-Person Household  |  7-Person Household  |  8-Person Household   
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---  
80%  |  $68,500 |  $78,250 |  $88,050 |  $97,800 |  $105,650  |  $113,450  |  $121,300  |  $129,100  
  
_*Includes children. For example: 2 adults over 18 years old and 1 child in a household would be defined as a 3-Person Household._
_**Source:** [https://www.austintexas.gov/department/housing-and-planning](https://www.austintexas.gov/housing)_
###  General Requirements
  * You must live in the house you want weatherized. 
  * You must live in a single-family home, duplex, triplex, fourplex, or mobile home. 
  * The home improvement value must be $478,195 or less (excluding land value). 
  * Your home must be 2,500 square feet or smaller. 
  * Your home must be more than 10 years old. 
  * The home must not have participated in the Weatherization Assistance program or the Home Energy Savings (formerly Home Performance with ENERGY STAR®) program within the last 10 years. 
  * You must submit the [Weatherization Assistance Program Form](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_english) or [en español: Formulario del programa de Weatherization Assistance](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_spanish). 
  * Both owners and renters can apply. If you rent, your landlord must sign the [Landlord Permission Form / Formulario de permiso del arrendador (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AE-WAP-Landlord-Permission-Form.pdf?rev=2c58b45153fb4162924d77312c7e3b95&sc_lang=en&hash=E7098A8FF61017E81C51A2CCA2F69964 "Landlord Permission Form \(pdf\)"). 


  1. Complete and submit the [Weatherization Assistance Form](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_english), or [en español: Formulario del programa de Weatherization Assistance](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_spanish).  
  
If you rent, please also complete this [Landlord Permission Form / Formulario de permiso del arrendador (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AE-WAP-Landlord-Permission-Form.pdf?rev=2c58b45153fb4162924d77312c7e3b95&sc_lang=en&hash=E7098A8FF61017E81C51A2CCA2F69964 "Landlord Permission Form \(pdf\)"). If you have questions, please call 512-482-5346 or email Weatherization.  

  2. If you cannot complete the online enrollment form, you can print and complete the [Weatherization Assistance Program application (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/WeatherizationAssistanceApplicationEngSpan.pdf?rev=46506c14124f4409b5a354a7426fb9e4&sc_lang=en&hash=F54B6750CF21817A03368843B08660A9).  
  
Once you complete and sign the Weatherization Assistance Form (with Landlord Permission Form, if needed), please mail to:  
  
Austin Energy  
Weatherization Assistance Program  
4815 Mueller Blvd  
Austin, TX 78723-3573  

  3. Austin Energy will contact you to discuss the next steps for your home.  

  4. A participating contractor will contact you to schedule a home energy assessment. This will determine which energy improvements your home needs.  

  5. Qualifying homes will receive free home energy improvements from the participating contractor.  

  6. Austin Energy will schedule a final inspection of the completed home energy improvements. 


  
**Please note that potential participants could be placed on a waiting list if the program reaches currently funded capacity.**
####  ![DocumentIcon](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/documentIconNew.png?rev=ce37e3189dcf4202829a7f960eb90cbd&hash=DB741C1488BE4A02EB12ABE83D5C1CC1) Additional Documents
  * [Landlord Permission Form / Formulario de permiso del arrendador (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AE-WAP-Landlord-Permission-Form.pdf?rev=2c58b45153fb4162924d77312c7e3b95&sc_lang=en&hash=E7098A8FF61017E81C51A2CCA2F69964)


####  Disclaimer
Funding is limited and available only to Austin Energy customers on a first-come, first-served basis. Offerings are subject to change without notice.
Materials and installation are under warranty for one year. For all warranty items, customers will work directly with the contractor who performs the work.
After the one-year warranty period expires, Austin Energy will not intervene in customer and participating contractor disputes.
Program guidelines include additional requirements and limitations for receiving the above rebates. Contact us for more details.
Date last reviewed or modified: 03/07/2025

If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

# About Austin Energy Rebates & Incentives
## Energy Efficiency Savings for Your Wallet, Your Comfort, Your Health, and the Environment
### Residential
#### REBATES & INCENTIVES
  * ##### Appliances and Equipment
    * [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heaters")

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Mom and daughter saving money](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/shutterstock_2292730127_small.jpg?rev=10484a07b2774c7f8821f525e13c8820&w=780&hash=176926A713B13AB72EB2D5031106F512)
With Austin Energy, you hold the power of a community-owned electric utility dedicated to benefiting customers, the community, and the world.
###  City of Austin Commitment Benefits You 
Our rebates and incentives regularly empower customers like you to lower energy bills, increase indoor comfort, improve indoor air quality and reduce your environmental impact. 
The City of Austin funds these energy efficiency programs, rebates and incentives to help make electricity more affordable and to encourage sustainable energy use in residential, commercial and multifamily settings. 
Then, you benefit. 
Your needs inspire our offerings. Our award-winning collaboration with you inspires our community. Our community inspires the nation and the world. 
###  Energy Savings Keeps Rates Low 
Austin Energy’s rates are designed to promote conservation. When customers and Austin Energy invest funds together into energy efficiency and demand reduction measures, monthly usage can decrease and the savings can begin. 
Save money. Increase your comfort. Clean indoor air. Help the environment. Enjoy rebates and incentives along the way. It’s worth the investment. 
![Residential Offerings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/About/aboutResidential.jpg?rev=d394a725dbc64b818c2cbbb27c9b0544&hash=0EF71BEE512B1E2F855962A047CF5C2F)
**Residential Offerings**
  * Manage your energy usage with [Power Partner Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner Thermostats") and monitor it through [City of Austin Utilities Online Customer Care](https://coautilities.com). 
  * Save on energy bills, improve the air quality in your home and redefine comfort through [Home Energy Savings upgrades, rebates and financing.](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings "Home Performance with ENERGY STAR")
  * Enjoy [instant savings while shopping for energy-efficient products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Instant In-Store Savings on Energy-Efficient Products") at participating retailers. 
  * Install a [variable-speed pool pump](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pool-pump "Pool Pumps") to save energy. 


![Commercial Offerings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/About/aboutCommercial.jpg?rev=467c5fdcaf1d4e38ac164b009b4793da&hash=E12A6639994647EC60DFB4D5F2A840A7)
**Commercial Offerings**
  * Uncover potential energy savings through [Austin Energy's commercial interactive web app](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Austin Energy Commercial Web App") available at no cost to you. 
  * Save on energy efficiency investments like lighting, heating and cooling, and building envelope, and more with [rebates for businesses](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/com-rebates). 
  * Combine energy-saving upgrades at near zero cost with a custom [Small Business Bundle](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/sb-bundle). 
  * Invest in energy efficiency during a [new construction project](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/new-construction/new-construction "New Construction Rebates"). 


![Multifamily Offerings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/About/aboutMultifamily.jpg?rev=270c39fa03954663bd562b3e01c8a3d5&hash=5FFBC1F5DA1E89447B0B3A43186E0134)
**Multifamily Offerings**
  * Get more light for your money with [LED high efficiency lighting rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/lighting/lighting "High Efficiency Lighting"). 
  * Replace old, inefficient [air conditioners](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/hvac "Multifamily HVAC") and [insulation](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/property-improvements/insulation "Multifamily Ceiling Insulation") to increase comfort for your residents and manage energy costs. 
  * Upgrade [ductwork](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/duct "Duct Diagnostics and Improvement") for improved air quality and air flow throughout your property while repairing leaks. 
  * Remember [solar window screens and window replacements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/property-improvements/window "Solar Window Shading") to keep your residents and your property comfortable. 


For information about rebates and incentives to meet your specific needs, call 512-482-5346 or email Customer Energy Solutions. 
###  Austin Energy Participating Contractors: Conserving Energy Together 
At Austin Energy, we work closely with local trade professionals to help serve the energy-efficiency needs of our community. Our participating contractors work closely with Austin Energy and our customers on improvements to help conserve energy, save money, increase comfort and even improve indoor air quality in your home or business. Many of these participating contractors receive special training to participate in our programs and maintain quality standards. 
Participating contractors also help guide customers through the application process for rebates, loans, and other incentives available from Austin Energy as applicable. 
  * [Access our list of participating contractors](https://savings.austinenergy.com/contractors/companies/all-participating-contractors "All Registered Trade Allies")
  * [Learn how to become a participating contractor](https://savings.austinenergy.com/contractors "Austin Energy Trade Allies")

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

Learn how businesses save with Energy Profiler Online, rebates for small to large businesses, Small Business Bundle and the Austin Energy app.
  * [![Energy Profiler Online](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Com-EnergyProfilerOnline.jpg?rev=a8cf67c1a4d14346b2c7f8e74bb5d75f&w=400&hash=61DDCE7873F6B0BB9414395CDF45E62F)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/energy-profiler-online "Energy Profiler Online")
### [Energy Profiler Online](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/energy-profiler-online "Energy Profiler Online")
Get detailed reporting and load profiling for your complex business operations or multiple commercial accounts.
  * [![Shopkeeper putting up Open sign](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Comm-financing-options.jpg?rev=b45651bae2b2458ea5f86eec77f68a7a&w=400&hash=3FABC825CCF2E76B374C2E1FA0B8DACF)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/Financing-Options "Financing Options")
### [Financing Options](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/Financing-Options "Financing Options")
  * [![Manage Your Business Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Com-Manage-Your-Commercial-Energy-Costs.jpg?rev=da7ffd1ab0394c678921191473c0985a&w=400&hash=3A68DEB7CBAEEDB54C358EC59A3700A1)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Manage Your Business Energy Costs")
### [Manage Your Business Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Manage Your Business Energy Costs")
The Austin Energy App allows business customers to monitor daily energy consumption, view bill history, and see a forecast of your next energy bill.
  * [![Collage of employees in the workplace](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Com-Rebates-for-Small-to-Large-Businesses.jpg?rev=5049e04937b14c249c3d7ffb979fb332&w=400&hash=1A2B111E6FC5B980CFFB6CF13CFAE382)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/com-rebates "Rebates for Small to Large Businesses")
### [Rebates for Small to Large Businesses](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/com-rebates "Rebates for Small to Large Businesses")
Earn up to $10,000 per year in rebates and enjoy long-term savings when you invest in energy efficiency for your business. 
  * [![Small Business Bundled Upgrades Near Zero Cost](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/ECOM_24_3603_site_banner_800x450.jpg?rev=fd88608590d54e19a07fe9dadb96ae59&w=400&hash=F885AFC07E30EE29616FF55C463160FB)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/sb-bundle "	Small Business Bundled Upgrades Near Zero Cost")
### [Small Business Bundled Upgrades Near Zero Cost](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/sb-bundle "	Small Business Bundled Upgrades Near Zero Cost")
Use less energy, save money, and boost reliability. Meet your goals with a tailored Small Business Bundle.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

## Energy Savings Are Within Reach
### Rebates & Incentives

  * Appliances and Equipment![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Small Business Bundled Upgrades Near Zero Cost](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/ECOM_24_3603_site_banner_800x450.jpg?rev=fd88608590d54e19a07fe9dadb96ae59&w=780&hash=A0E366C88131CF00AD89B4E6609AA2BA)
Use less energy, save money, and boost reliability. Meet your goals with a tailored Small Business Bundle.
### Save BIG by Bundling Energy Efficiency Upgrades
Austin Energy will cover up to 100% of parts and labor costs when you bundle energy-saving improvements. Qualifying small businesses can get an HVAC tune-up, plus LED lighting and smart thermostat upgrades, at little to no cost. Learn what options will benefit your business most at your free professional consultation. Email the Small Business team to schedule your consultation or get more info.
### Greater Rewards When You Bundle
Small businesses can unlock an additional 30% bonus over standard rebates on other upgrades and services for your business, including:
  * Appliances and equipment
  * Heating and cooling
  * Property improvements
  * Load management improvements


Check out the [Commercial Rebate Summary (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Commercial-Rebate-Summary.pdf?rev=81ebda3c56ff41c48f8cf1bd12f512b4&sc_lang=en&hash=4F40598FCD1E42A53242C461FE20FCFE) for a full list. Let’s partner to make your small business more energy efficient while lowering monthly costs.
### Affordable Financing Available
Austin Energy and Velocity Credit Union now offer low- or no-interest loans for small businesses to invest in energy-saving upgrades. Combine these loans with Austin Energy rebates to reduce your total project costs even more. Learn more about [Velocity Credit Union’s Small Business loan program](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/Financing-Options) and how to get started.
### Learn More
  * [Small Business Bundle Summary (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/20240326_AE_COM_SmallBizBundle_Summary.pdf?rev=8ab97c2c8d23431face976613a9a2b95&sc_lang=en&hash=6C692B944C9E7F01A10CAF33F6F32A36)
  * [Commercial Rebate Summary (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Commercial-Rebate-Summary.pdf?rev=81ebda3c56ff41c48f8cf1bd12f512b4&sc_lang=en&hash=4F40598FCD1E42A53242C461FE20FCFE)

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

Austin Energy's Commercial Rebates help businesses of all sizes, non-profits and houses of worship make energy efficiency affordable. Earn an average rebate of $5,000 when you invest in these equipment and process improvements.
  * [![Worker installing ceiling insulation](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/ceiling-insulation-800x533.jpg?rev=21d1f5c3bdec42c48aab322ac46b0ac7&w=400&hash=6B4661862CC643F4B906027FC11BE2C1)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/property-improvements/insulation "Ceiling and Roof Insulation")
### [Ceiling and Roof Insulation](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/property-improvements/insulation "Ceiling and Roof Insulation")
Boost savings and comfort by installing new, energy-saving ceiling or roof insulation. Commercial customers earn a rebate of $0.75 per square foot installed.
  * [![Chillers](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Chiller.jpg?rev=fb7b7e55ace5473cb1def7819ce31fb0&w=400&hash=61DA8098816E43ED09BBF05A014C85DA)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/chiller "Chillers")
### [Chillers](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/chiller "Chillers")
Save energy and earn a rebate when you install a high-efficiency air or water-cooled chiller.
  * [![Two workers with hard hats having a discussion](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/commercial-dr-800x533.jpg?rev=639383cae4a44cf4ab130ac763a62872&w=400&hash=B2013658D0908A7F74BB3D4B4231F3FB)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/load-management/commercial-demand-response "Commercial Demand Response")
### [Commercial Demand Response](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/load-management/commercial-demand-response "Commercial Demand Response")
Earn rewards for reducing your energy use at peak times. Austin Energy pays $50-$80 per average kW saved during these events.
  * [![Commercial Kitchen Equipment](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Com-Kitchen-Equipment.jpg?rev=0a70b3c477d449fb8a4118b206e4bf94&w=400&hash=C6FDCA05A779FD70B28BE4514833D0A8)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/com-kitchen "Commercial Kitchen Equipment")
### [Commercial Kitchen Equipment](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/com-kitchen "Commercial Kitchen Equipment")
Keep your kitchen running smoothly and earn a rebate when you upgrade to energy-saving commercial kitchen equipment.
  * [![Cooling Towers](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Cooling-Tower.jpg?rev=4d6f90be1ef446d59185f8b157c24d99&w=400&hash=73D74337DB314B5F123FAC15C40F2556)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/cooling-tower "Cooling Towers")
### [Cooling Towers](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/cooling-tower "Cooling Towers")
Save on operating costs and earn when you install a new, high-efficiency cooling tower. Austin Energy offers $420 per kW you save. 
  * [![Custom Technologies](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Custom-Technologies.jpg?rev=f40bb50f6f484654bba4f22f75ca6e61&w=400&hash=5B2C2D63BA80C2305229D3F05DF6264E)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/custom-tech "Custom Technologies")
### [Custom Technologies](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/custom-tech "Custom Technologies")
Don’t see a rebate for your project? No problem. Austin Energy offers customized rebates for most energy-saving equipment and process improvements. 
  * [![Image of a electronically commutated motor](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/ec-motor-800x533.jpg?rev=99f1f423a0f74b3d82f6ebde9e173503&w=400&hash=08F7D739AEB474B98601E3154920CDC2)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/ecm "EC Motor Rebates")
### [EC Motor Rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/ecm "EC Motor Rebates")
Increase efficiency by installing or retrofitting equipment with high-efficiency electronically commutated motors (ECM). Austin Energy pays $420 per kW you save.
  * [![Energy Recovery Ventilators](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Energy-Recovery-Ventilators.jpg?rev=47508987a1284447911a97d2b8a254ef&w=400&hash=139B36D509419724F69AA8AEA8A06110)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ervs "Energy Recovery Ventilators")
### [Energy Recovery Ventilators](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ervs "Energy Recovery Ventilators")
Save money and improve air quality with an energy recovery ventilator (ERV). Austin Energy pays $420 per kW your ERV saves.
  * [![commercial charging while you shop](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/BusinessEVCharger_800x560.png?rev=3c9cec5f4ed74dcf9c36cf27e5638bc3&w=400&hash=F9FDAEA7987B46E37BC007DCC579B4F2)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/EV-Charger-Rebate "EV Charger Rebate")
### [EV Charger Rebate](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/EV-Charger-Rebate "EV Charger Rebate")
Get a rebate to cut costs on installing electric vehicle charging stations at your business, non-profit or multi-family property.
  * [![Guest Room Controllers](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Guest-Room.jpg?rev=d6e818612b634e4db36de8f1931fad52&w=400&hash=175ECF7F543B1919685C6A821812ADC2)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/guest-room-controller "Guest Room Controllers")
### [Guest Room Controllers](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/guest-room-controller "Guest Room Controllers")
Earn rebates to equip guest rooms with occupancy-based thermostat controllers. Austin Energy pays $50 for each eligible controller you install.
  * [![Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-HP-Water-Heater.jpg?rev=5e9eb77d9d7a45e9b20ce05102d815aa&w=400&hash=CE0F9CF58D5E6F8F1B5B7C3E861FA0C9)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heaters")
### [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heaters")
Earn an $800 rebate on qualified high-efficiency heat pump water heaters.
  * [![High Efficiency Lighting and Controls](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-High-Efficiency-Lighting.jpg?rev=db7bca907c434bc49685e6ae28e5b97c&w=400&hash=86CA14B9E80CDDC9E2D89C6B7CC59DDD)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/lighting/high-eff-lighting "High Efficiency Lighting and Controls")
### [High Efficiency Lighting and Controls](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/lighting/high-eff-lighting "High Efficiency Lighting and Controls")
Earn rebates and save on utility bills with high-efficiency lighting for your business. 
  * [![HVAC Replacement](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-HVAC-Replacement.jpg?rev=6bb8fdeb3aa846eb8680324a2aca3fe6&w=400&hash=75F6B36B11A325098BE39AEA5406F521)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/hvac "HVAC Replacement")
### [HVAC Replacement](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/hvac "HVAC Replacement")
Earn a rebate when you upgrade to energy-efficient HVAC equipment for your business.
  * [![Commercial HVAC Tune-Up](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/Com-HVAC-Tune-Up.jpg?rev=2b78b8b05d3f47d89585a4c1de3f2eab&w=400&hash=E806016EF492B346BA7C777C14EF7778)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/hvac-tune-up "HVAC Tune-Up")
### [HVAC Tune-Up](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/hvac-tune-up "HVAC Tune-Up")
Earn a rebate up to $680 when you have a participating contractor tune up your HVAC system. 
  * [![solar charging while you park](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/CRS_Solar_Business_Header_800x560.jpg?rev=d49d31cc47594b8594df95b491d40973&w=400&hash=B2E07158C226AFF6E9EE518743AF30EF)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/Incentives-for-Solar-Systems "Incentives for Solar Systems")
### [Incentives for Solar Systems](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/Incentives-for-Solar-Systems "Incentives for Solar Systems")
Earn an incentive to reduce the cost of installing on-site solar.
  * [![New Construction Lighting](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-New-Construction-Lighting.jpg?rev=a1f0aad870ea450b94abee162cb0a53c&w=400&hash=3B138284082EDF5B8EC87FA983BB1DED)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/lighting/lighting-new "New Construction Lighting")
### [New Construction Lighting](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/lighting/lighting-new "New Construction Lighting")
Earn up to $370 per kW you save with high-efficiency lighting for your new construction project. 
  * [![New Construction Rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-New-Construction.jpg?rev=335080605ae44398b2605ac9e784dfee&w=400&hash=D8ADF4155399E627E2D7BCC7DB52EE43)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/new-construction/new-construction "New Construction Rebates")
### [New Construction Rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/new-construction/new-construction "New Construction Rebates")
Earn rebates for including energy-efficient technologies in your new construction and major remodel projects.
  * [![Power Partner℠ Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Res-Smart-Energy-Savings-Helps-Keep-Rates-Low.jpg?rev=5c2f61e325f9444a990c7f8d0034aac3&w=400&hash=E4B662075108C6AB172CA567E611C17E)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner℠ Thermostats")
### [Power Partner℠ Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner℠ Thermostats")
Get rebates for smart thermostats and earn up to $75 in bill credits when you enroll in the Power Partner program.
  * [![Reflective Roof Coating](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Reflective-Roof-Coating.jpg?rev=7ba3194f85e04d0a89ec4b87ac0c8f62&w=400&hash=72698B2078B42E5701B9FBADB969191A)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/property-improvements/reflective-roof "Reflective Roof Coating")
### [Reflective Roof Coating](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/property-improvements/reflective-roof "Reflective Roof Coating")
Keep heat out of your building and save money on air conditioning with spray-on or paint-on reflective roof coatings. Austin Energy will rebate $0.20 per square foot of coating applied.
  * [![commercial solar charging](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/PalmerSolarSkyline_800x560.jpg?rev=c018af07fea64d23849308d28b4a8452&w=400&hash=D44A9AD06D9D85EEE19AA8BD83DDF99D)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/Solar-Standard-Offer-Program "Solar Standard Offer Program")
### [Solar Standard Offer Program](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/Solar-Standard-Offer-Program "Solar Standard Offer Program")
The Solar Standard Offer Program helps commercial businesses and properties install solar panels for the Community Solar program. Host customers can either install solar panels or lease their space to a third-party system owner. The owner of the solar system will be compensated by Austin Energy for the solar power generated.
  * [![Illustration of thermal energy storage process](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/thermal-energy-storage-800x533.jpg?rev=e886d021c5af4d0698f7c93d48a07aa1&w=400&hash=29DCE3E61B4C7A9E61D0AFDE3E790AC5)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/thermal-storage "Thermal Energy Storage")
### [Thermal Energy Storage](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/cooling-and-heating/thermal-storage "Thermal Energy Storage")
Change the way you cool your building and earn rebates on thermal energy storage systems. 
  * [![Uninterruptible Power Supplies \(UPS\)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Uninterruptible-Power-Supplies.jpg?rev=43328f94996741c290b0360d5299442a&w=400&hash=AFA267C7CFCD4DA31E1971FD0063D1CB)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/ups "Uninterruptible Power Supplies \(UPS\)")
### [Uninterruptible Power Supplies (UPS)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/ups "Uninterruptible Power Supplies \(UPS\)")
Earn rebates when you install a high-efficiency uninterruptible power supply (UPS) for emergency backup power. Austin Energy pays $420 per kW your UPS saves.
  * [![Person working on laptop with dog](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/bill_breakdown_laptop.jpg?rev=31080604dd3644ba8d5bc057918e309e&w=400&hash=4C513196D1651F793F7DC78B6C7B6A3E)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/Value-of-Solar-Bill-Credit "Value of Solar Bill Credit")
### [Value of Solar Bill Credit](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/Value-of-Solar-Bill-Credit "Value of Solar Bill Credit")
Earn bill credits for energy produced by on-site energy systems.
  * [![Several variable frequency drives side by side](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/variable-frequency-drivesjpg-800x533.jpg?rev=416ff56a636d42eab353c624abadd3c2&w=400&hash=BD8397167D2BB3D01C4E041D1524F05A)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/vfd "Variable Frequency Drives \(VFD\)")
### [Variable Frequency Drives (VFD)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/vfd "Variable Frequency Drives \(VFD\)")
Run your motors more efficiently with variable frequency drives (VFD). Austin Energy pays $480 per kW your VFD saves.
  * [![Window Treatments and Replacements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Window-Treatments.jpg?rev=dfc32a4de7b844228a6553fe3a092393&w=400&hash=A6E8421E660F54577EC9DC51FECBC771)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/property-improvements/window "Window Treatments and Replacements")
### [Window Treatments and Replacements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/property-improvements/window "Window Treatments and Replacements")
Earn rebates to install solar shading, window film or energy-efficient windows. Austin Energy pays up to $1.73 per square foot of window treated or replaced.
