### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Save Money &amp;amp; Energy](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/saveMoneyIcon.png?rev=2b1b281496e04fe7a0a742e47063c371&w=100&hash=67157C959E7182DF29B2FC48F4EBC8D4)
Save Money & Energy
Saving energy and money go hand-in-hand. We can all contribute to reducing Austin’s energy demand by making simple lifestyle changes and energy-efficient home improvements. When demand decreases, we all save. Austin Energy is committed to helping our customers achieve the greatest savings possible.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/property-improvements/window "Save Money & Energy")
![Window Treatments and Replacements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Com-Window-Treatments.jpg?rev=dfc32a4de7b844228a6553fe3a092393&w=780&hash=66C457A4B76379675F1B82622BB85952)
Keep the heat out and let light in. You can earn a rebate to install window treatments or energy-efficient windows for your business. 
  * Description
  * Incentive
  * Eligibility
  * How to Apply


Energy-efficient Low-E (low emissivity) windows, solar screens, and window film can significantly reduce the heat coming through your windows while allowing you to enjoy natural light. 
You can add solar screens or window film to existing windows. This saves energy without requiring you to replace your windows. Eligible glass may be clear or factory tinted and single or double-paned. These window treatments provide the following benefits: 
  * Block up to 80% of the sun’s heat 
  * Lower cooling bills 
  * Reduce damaging UV rays 
  * Increase daytime privacy 


We can also help if your windows need to be replaced. Replacing your windows with Low-E windows can reduce inside heat loss during the winter and keep heat out during the summer. 
###  More Savings Opportunities for Small Businesses 
Austin Energy’s [Small Business Bundle](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/sb-bundle) can provide LED lighting, an HVAC tune-up, and smart thermostat upgrades at little to no cost.
Qualified small businesses, small non-profits, and houses of worship may also be eligible for a 30% bonus rebate on our standard commercial rebates. This bonus rebate applies only to retrofits for a wide range of improvements. 
Call Austin Energy at **512-482-5346** or email Small Business Outreach for more information. 
###  PACE Financing Available 
Austin Energy provides various opportunities for our customers to purchase energy efficient technologies. Many of these reduce energy consumption and enhance comfort and indoor air quality for your customers. PACE is an effective financing approach. Travis and Williamson County PACE programs enable owners of non-profit, commercial, and industrial properties to obtain low-cost, long-term financing for water and energy efficiency improvements and solar generation retrofits. 
Private sector lenders finance qualified improvements and property owners voluntarily agree to contractual assessments imposed on the property. PACE improvements generate positive cash flow with no out-of-pocket cost to the property owner. If the property is sold before the full amount is repaid, the repayment obligation automatically transfers to the next owner. PACE assessments complement Austin Energy incentive programs. 
  * [Learn more about the Texas PACE Authority](http://www.texaspaceauthority.org/)
  * [Browse Texas PACE Authority case studies and other resources](https://www.texaspaceauthority.org/resources/)


Window Film and Solar Shading   
---  
Solar heat gain coefficient (SHGC) 0.37 or less  |  $1.44/sq. ft.  
SHGC 0.50-0.38 (retail store fronts only)  |  $0.86/sq. ft.  
Window Replacements with Low-E Windows   
SHGC 0.27 or less  |  $1.73/sq. ft.  
###  Prerequisites 
  * For retrofits and equipment replacement, applicants must submit rebate applications before installation. For new construction projects, applications must be submitted before the certificate of occupancy is issued. Rebates will not be provided retroactively.
  * Rebates are only available for equipment or retrofits that: 
    * Operate weekdays between 3 p.m. and 6 p.m., June through September (educational facilities and houses of worship are exempt from this requirement)
    * Use electricity as its primary or secondary fuel type (please refer to [Texas Gas Service](https://www.texasgasservice.com/save-money/rebates-and-incentives) for rebates on natural gas equipment)
    * Provide kW savings by exceeding requirements for energy efficiency listed in [City of Austin Energy Code Chapter 25-12-261](https://library.municode.com/tx/austin/codes/land_development_code?nodeId=TIT25LADE_CH25-12TECO_ART4ENCO_S25-12-261INENCOCO "City of Austin Energy Code Chapter 25-12-261") or as determined by Austin Energy
    * Are new, energized, and have a minimum one-year warranty (backup or redundant systems are not eligible) and 
    * Are installed in permanent buildings or structures
  * Commercial Rebates are available for Austin Energy customers with commercial electric service.
  * The building where the equipment will be installed must comply with the [Energy Conservation Audit and Disclosure (ECAD) ordinance](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/for-commercial-buildings/for-commercial-buildings "Energy Conservation Audit and Disclosure \(ECAD\) ordinance") (unless exempt or located outside of Austin city limits). 
  * Multifamily properties applying for Commercial Rebates (for master-metered properties or work undertaken in common spaces) must meet all Multifamily program and equipment installation requirements. Properties must not be listed with the City of Austin Code Department’s [Repeat Offender Program](http://www.austintexas.gov/department/repeat-offender-program "Repeat Offender Program").


###  **Specific Requirements**
  * Rebate applies for existing buildings only. 
  * Horizontal skylights are eligible for rebate. 
  * You may replace deteriorated film with new film or solar screens. 
  * You must permanently affix the treatment to the glass (for film) or window frame (for screen). 
  * You must attach manufacturer product information with the rated solar heat gain coefficient (SHGC) and warranty statement. 
  * Windows must not be more than 50% shaded from June through September. 
  * Windows must not face north or northeast. 
  * New windows must have a solar heat gain coefficient (SHGC) of 0.27 or less. 
  * Solar treatments must have an SHGC of 0.37 or less to qualify. 


###  Commercial Rebate Program Requirements 
  * Austin Energy can help customers evaluate energy efficiency opportunities for their business or organization. Please email us for help calculating potential rebates or other technical guidance. 
  * Applications must qualify to receive at least $25 in rebates. 
  * The customer or contractor applying for the rebate must: 
    * Submit all required application information and equipment documentation (incomplete applications are placed on hold and may be cancelled after 90 days). 
    * Agree to schedule pre-installation and post-installation site visits to allow Austin Energy staff to verify existing and installed equipment. 
  * For customers or properties applying for a rebate to upgrade or retrofit the same equipment that received a historical Austin Energy rebate within the past 10 years, the new rebate will be calculated based on the incremental energy savings. For example, suppose a customer or property received a historical lighting rebate. In that case, any new lighting equipment rebates will be calculated using the incremental energy savings between the existing and new equipment. Exemptions from this requirement due to emergency replacement of failed equipment are evaluated on a case-by-case basis. 
  * A 30% bonus rebate is available for eligible: 1) locally owned or franchised small-business customers; 2) small 501(c) non-profit organizations; and 3) houses of worship. Eligibility for large campuses or facilities with multiple accounts held by one customer will be determined on a case-by-case basis. Contact us to determine if you qualify. 
    * Eligible small businesses must: 1) be locally owned or franchised (headquartered in the Austin metropolitan area — a W-9 may be required to verify); and 2) use Austin Energy Secondary Voltage Rate 1 (<10kW) or Rate 2 (>10kW <300kW). 
    * Eligible non-profits must: 1) provide an IRS determination letter or similar IRS documentation verifying their tax-exempt 501(c) status; and 2) use Austin Energy Secondary Voltage Rate 1 (<10kW) or Rate 2 (>10kW <300kW). Government entities, tax-exempt real estate trusts and housing co-ops are not eligible for this bonus. 
    * All houses of worship are eligible, regardless of rate. 
  * Rebates will not be paid unless all installed equipment and retrofits comply with the manufacturer's requirements and all local, state, and federal regulations, including building code and permitting requirements. For requirements on when electrical permits are required, refer to City of Austin Municipal Code [chapter 25-12-113, section 80.19(c)](https://library.municode.com/tx/austin/codes/land_development_code?nodeId=TIT25LADE_CH25-12TECO_ART4ELCO "City of Austin Energy Code Chapter 25-12-113"). For requirements on when permits are required for mechanical work, refer to City of Austin Municipal Code [chapter 25-12-133, section 104.2](https://library.municode.com/tx/austin/codes/land_development_code?nodeId=TIT25LADE_CH25-12TECO_ART5MECO_S25-12-133LOAMUNMECO "City of Austin Municipal code chapter 25-12-133, section 104.2"). For more information on mechanical, electrical, and building permits contact the [City of Austin Department of Development Services](https://www.austintexas.gov/development-services/types-permits "the City of Austin Department of Development Services"). 
  * Commercial Rebates are subject to capping based on the total project cost related to the installation of the rebated equipment or retrofits. The applicant is responsible for reporting total job cost. Austin Energy reserves the right to require a signed, itemized invoice or work order for verification. 
    * Standard Commercial Rebates cannot exceed 50% of total job costs. 
    * Rebates cannot exceed 80% of total job costs for locally owned small businesses, non-profits, and houses of worship that receive the 30% bonus. 
  * By default, the rebate payment is directed to the customer listed on the Austin Energy electric account. The rebate may also be directed to one of the following parties if all requirements are met. 
    * A parent corporation or organization of the account holder 
    * The building owner, who is verified using county tax records 
    * A tenant at the property, who must provide a letter signed by the account holder authorizing the rebate to be paid to the tenant 
    * A participating contractor or any other third party, who must: 1) register as a City of Austin vendor; 2) register in Austin Energy's rebate processing system; and 3) provide a letter signed by the account holder authorizing the rebate to be paid to that party 
  * If a participating contractor plans to submit more than one rebate application on behalf of Austin Energy customers, they are required to: 1) register as a City of Austin vendor; and 2) register in Austin Energy's rebate processing system. 
  * Austin Energy reserves the right to deny or adjust all rebate applications. 
  * Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. All participating contractors must abide by the [Austin Energy Code of Conduct and Ethical Requirements (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyCodeConduct-v2esign.pdf?rev=f218a19f977841de9b02c9435aa63e16&sc_lang=en&hash=2CCBAF0C6FB8E06AF11F75A6CB8345F9). 


###  General Instructions 
  * Please submit all rebate applications before installation is complete. Applications submitted after the work is complete will not be accepted. 
  * See below for a list of documents and information required to complete the rebate application. 
  * Please inquire whether your installation contractor is registered with Austin Energy and able to submit the application on your behalf. 
  * By default, the rebate payment is directed to the account holder, but payments to contractors and alternate payees are possible with the account holder’s approval. 
  * If you have any questions or need assistance with verifying eligibility or estimated rebates, email Austin Energy Commercial Rebates. 


###  Online Application 
Account holders may submit applications using the [Commercial Online Rebate Application](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#enrollment/?programId=1094). If you are unsure of any values or fields, make a note in the comments so they can be corrected or verified later. 
###  Required Documents and Information for Commercial Rebate Applications 
  * Austin Energy Commercial account number
  * Contact information, if different from account information 
  * Pre- and post-installation photos may be required for existing and/or installed equipment 


#### Interested?
We can help you learn more about your rebate and savings options before you apply.
[Request Assistance](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#lead/default?programId=1094)
#### Apply for a Rebate Online
You can apply for your rebate online. To make applying easier, have all required information on hand before you start.
[Apply Online](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#enrollment/?programId=1094)
#### Are You Waiting for a Rebate?
Use the confirmation (enrollment) and utility account numbers to check the status of your rebate application.
[Check Status](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#status/statuscheck?programId=1094)
  * Lighting retrofits require pre-installation pictures of existing equipment 
    * Applications must include a completed Austin Energy Lighting Calculator. Please email Austin Energy Commercial Rebates to obtain the calculator file or receive assistance. 
  * Manufacturer specification sheets and AHRI cut sheets for equipment to be installed 
    * This may be submitted via email after submitting the application.
  * Invoice or quote 
    * This may be submitted via email after submitting the application. 
  * Rebate payee 
    * By default, rebate payments are directed to the Austin Energy electric account holder. The rebate payment may be directed to other parties with the authorization of the Austin Energy account holder. 


NOTE: If your building is over 10,000 square feet, you must comply with the [Energy Conservation Audit and Disclosure (ECAD) ordinance](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/for-commercial-buildings). 
### Non-Profit and Small Business Bonus 
A 30% bonus is available for these eligible customers: 
  * **Texas-owned or franchised small-business customers**
    * Must use Austin Energy Electric Rate Tier 1 (<10kW) or 2 (<300kW) and may be required to provide a W-9 verifying the business is Texas owned or franchised.
  * **Non-profit organizations**
    * Must use Austin Energy Electric Rate Tier 1 (<10kW) or 2 (<300kW) and may be required to provide an IRS determination letter or similar documentation verifying their tax-exempt 501(c)(3) status. 
    * Tax exempt real estate trusts and housing co-ops are not eligible. 
  * **Houses of worship**
    * All houses of worship are eligible, regardless of electric rate. 


###  Contact Austin Energy for More Information 
  * Call **512-482-5346** or email Austin Energy Commercial Rebates if you have questions about our rebates 
  * [Browse all Commercial rebate offerings and requirements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial)


####  ![DocumentIcon](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/documentIconNew.png?rev=ce37e3189dcf4202829a7f960eb90cbd&hash=DB741C1488BE4A02EB12ABE83D5C1CC1) Additional Documents
  * [Commercial Rebate Summary (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Offerings/Commercial-Rebate-Summary.pdf?rev=81ebda3c56ff41c48f8cf1bd12f512b4&sc_lang=en&hash=4F40598FCD1E42A53242C461FE20FCFE)


#### Disclaimer
Funding is limited and available on a first-come, first-served basis. Offerings, program guidelines, and rebate levels are subject to change without notice. Rebate funds are encumbered (committed to be paid) during the fiscal year in which they are to be disbursed.
The maximum combined rebate is $300,000 per customer site per fiscal year (October through September). 
Date last reviewed or modified: 05/27/2025

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Austin Energy Participating Contractors](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Contractors/Contractor-Landing.jpg?rev=982ffbe1f4e8430db9045e010b213dbe&w=780&hash=A598DE2248E9B6C29D072C74DCFAC515)
Participating contractors work closely with Austin Energy and our customers on energy-saving improvements to homes and businesses. 
Most Austin Energy rebate and incentive programs require work to be completed by a participating contractor. Participating contractors also help guide customers through the program processes. 
[View all participating contractors](https://savings.austinenergy.com/contractors/companies/all-participating-contractors "All Austin Energy participating contractors")
###  How to Become a Participating Contractor 
####  Step 1: Register with the City of Austin 
Create an account with [Austin Finance Online](https://financeonline.austintexas.gov/afo/account_services/registration/registration_user.cfm) to register as a vendor with the City of Austin.
####  Step 2: Register with Austin Energy 
  * Find the program for which you want to register below and click Register. 
  * Complete and submit the application. A representative will review and reply to your request.


To register for more than one program, email Customer Energy Solutions or call 512-482-5346. 
* * *
### Appliance Efficiency Program (AEP)
[Offerings for residential customers](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential)
[Register](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#tradeallyregistration/default?token=bitiK0p1UjJNVXBHL0FTb1BpQW0wbVdpdStjZkMzak12SmJSZUdFSjB4bUI0NjRybG9adlpvRnRnV00zSm84b1NJdEFXWXErZ2RrNDZ6dEJyTTlQVXlEL0tVOW1QSXJYeWdlVm1MK0VjM0xjZ05aTmpEVGdGcjEySlVRNHJhaTNwbThpZms2cStDM0JPYU5WWmVOZTI1VDVTeTFuNUxWWkNPK29tV2JnK0FScHVKcEJDdXFsL1E9PQ2)
* * *

### Multifamily Rebates
[Offerings for multifamily communities](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily)
[Register](https://pages.clearesult.com/austin-energy-multifamily-contractor-contact-form)
* * *
### Solar Rebates
[Offerings to help customers install solar panels](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/solar-solutions)
[Register](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/solar-solutions/participating-solar-contractors/become-a-participating-solar-contractor)
* * *
Note: Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. All participating contractors must abide by the [Austin Energy Code of Conduct and Ethical Requirements (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyCodeConduct-v2esign.pdf?rev=f218a19f977841de9b02c9435aa63e16&sc_lang=en&hash=2CCBAF0C6FB8E06AF11F75A6CB8345F9).

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Let’s Save Money and Energy Together
## Are you a homeowner, resident, large or small business owner, or a property manager? Austin Energy empowers our customers with rebates and incentives that help lower bills and increase energy savings.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/about "Lets Save Money and Energy Together")
  * [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Home Performance with ENERGY STAR")![Home energy improvements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/Savings-homepage-image_2018-dk.jpg?rev=0bc9577241f74135851e4078ee2ab5a8&w=1520&hash=81D8044620069BAECFAA505BF0EA53FD)
#  Home Energy Savings 
## For a limited time, enjoy rebates averaging $2,600 on home energy improvements. 
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Home Performance with ENERGY STAR")
  * [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products")![Discounts on select energy efficient products at select retailers](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/SPUR-00324-banner2.jpg?rev=e49b6d57ce8a41628815bd2658bbcfc0&w=1520&hash=9519B4B1FEDBFD4CCA2D4BC3AC90EAD6)
# Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products
## Enjoy in-store discounts on select energy efficient products. View products and participating stores.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products")
  * [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/com-rebates "Save Money and Energy for Business")![commercial energy rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/homepageSlide003.jpg?rev=27a66d0b5384473c862751b579719f31&w=1520&hash=D17DA716F93C0B8B576FCF2358C5B4AE)
#  Save Money and Energy for Your Business 
## 20+ rebates available for businesses of all sizes.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/com-rebates "Save Money and Energy for Business")


[](https://savings.austinenergy.com/en) [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/en)
# Customer Driven. Community Focused.
## Energy Savings for Your Home, Business, or Multifamily Property
Residential
We offer residential rebates and loans for heating, air conditioning, ventilation, lighting, pools, water heaters, and more.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential "Residential")
Commercial
Our commercial rebates and incentives help you save money and energy on heating and cooling costs and appliances for your business.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial "Commercial")
Multifamily
Our multifamily rebates help you efficiently control heating, cooling, and lighting costs without compromising comfort.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily "Multifamily")
## Featured Savings
  * [![Manage Your Residential Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Manage-Your-Residential-Energy-Costs.jpg?rev=d02502f98dc94ede837738a697de97e5&w=367&hash=43F1840BD73E9F93A229EAF74D325159)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "Manage Your Residential Energy Costs")
[Manage Your Residential Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "Manage Your Residential Energy Costs")
Austin Energy offers tools to help residential customers monitor energy usage, get customized tips for saving energy, and set alerts to help avoid high bills.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "Manage Your Residential Energy Costs")
  * [![Manage Your Business Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Learn/Com-Manage-Your-Commercial-Energy-Costs.jpg?rev=da7ffd1ab0394c678921191473c0985a&w=367&hash=2D3F64D63CEAB59605081211BDA08A52)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Manage Your Business Energy Costs")
[Manage Your Business Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Manage Your Business Energy Costs")
The Austin Energy App allows business customers to monitor daily energy consumption, view bill history, and see a forecast of your next energy bill.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app "Manage Your Business Energy Costs")
  * [![Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR&amp;reg; Products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/MF-Save-Residents-Money-with-ENERGY-STAR-Products.jpg?rev=095db88343454f69bc00fbfa4c5ff237&w=367&hash=D6C2133054D655CA265204999285DCEF)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-energy-star "Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products")
[Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-energy-star "Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products")
Your residents will thank you when you choose energy-efficient appliances and bulbs for your rental units.
[Learn More](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-energy-star "Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products")


![Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/hpIllustrationResized.jpg?rev=828f7b9888934409a32ac2e5edfbd35d&w=760&hash=F173C78F1B8BAA44F54F536678C747EA)
## Home Energy Savings
House 10+ years old? For a limited time, enjoy rebates averaging $2,600 plus access low-interest financing when you make whole-home energy improvements.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Home Energy Savings")
## Energy Management
Adjust Your Thermostat On The Go
If you have an Internet-connected thermostat and a smartphone, you can adjust your thermostat on the go. You can also set a personalized cooling or heating schedule for maximum comfort and minimum fuss.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/pp-thermostats "Adjust Your Thermostat On The Go")
![Adjust Your Thermostat On The Go](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/appShootResized.jpg?rev=a1669420b18d43bfad9399abe2ff174d&w=562&hash=ECCC536EE0179BACF9D1397B59FB83DB)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

Learn how multifamily properties save with Austin Energy's Multifamily Rebate Program, PACE Financing, choosing ENERGY STAR® products, and managing energy costs through the Austin Energy web app. 
  * [![Income Qualified Rebates for Multifamily Properties](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Multifamily-Income-Qualified.jpg?rev=3787bbeeb7354b70996829fb9202f6b1&w=400&hash=5A201DB6579BCC9B17DF96FE62755775)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/rebate-and-finance-options/income-qualified-rebates "Income Qualified Rebates for Multifamily Properties")
### [Income Qualified Rebates for Multifamily Properties](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/rebate-and-finance-options/income-qualified-rebates "Income Qualified Rebates for Multifamily Properties")
Austin Energy’s Multifamily Rebate Program is designed to provide low to no-cost energy efficiency improvements to affordable or low-income properties in the Austin Energy service area.
  * [![Manage Your Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/MF---Manage-Energy-Costs.jpg?rev=9daf565141274293a5901cda67e24266&w=400&hash=D1807D52D78A011B3FC0FF49164FFAA0)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-residents/multifamily-app "Manage Your Energy Costs")
### [Manage Your Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-residents/multifamily-app "Manage Your Energy Costs")
Austin Energy’s interactive web app for residential customers allows you to monitor your daily energy consumption, view your bill history, and see a future forecast of your energy bill cost.
  * [![PACE Financing](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/PACE-Financing.jpg?rev=242d918270954d4aaccb6161d1c13afb&w=400&hash=2C2B619F22A615115A30501836352BA6)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/rebate-and-finance-options/pace-financing "PACE Financing")
### [PACE Financing](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/rebate-and-finance-options/pace-financing "PACE Financing")
Affordable, long-term financing is available to cover the cost for energy efficiency, water conservation, and onsite generation technologies.
  * [![Reduce Summer Electric Use in Your Rental Properties](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/MF-Reduce-Summer-Electric-Use-in-Your-Rental-Properties.jpg?rev=eedef14e785a4107a94b001d3747773b&w=400&hash=2B64CDCE1AC65F16392A34F23DEC4677)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-tips "Reduce Summer Electric Use in Your  Rental Properties")
### [Reduce Summer Electric Use in Your Rental Properties](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-tips "Reduce Summer Electric Use in Your  Rental Properties")
Helping your residents save on their electric bills is easy when you know how. We can help.
  * [![Save Money with Easy Energy-Saving Tips](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/MF---Save-Money-with-Easy-Energy-Saving-Tips.jpg?rev=1c009f7b691b49b88ba52dbacf54660b&w=400&hash=CBB5C3CF3CAA14CE9E05FB12B1B9DD5A)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-residents/multifamily-tips "Save Money with Easy Energy-Saving Tips")
### [Save Money with Easy Energy-Saving Tips](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-residents/multifamily-tips "Save Money with Easy Energy-Saving Tips")
Find good tips for saving money and saving energy at the same time. Use less energy, monitor your electricity use, and more. 
  * [![Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR Products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/MF-Save-Residents-Money-with-ENERGY-STAR-Products.jpg?rev=095db88343454f69bc00fbfa4c5ff237&w=400&hash=0A317BE07A10DCC3B0D8AD4613517D68)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-energy-star "Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products")
### [Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/tips-for-property-managers/mf-energy-star "Save Residents Money with ENERGY STAR® Products")
Your residents will thank you when you choose energy-efficient appliances and bulbs for your rental units.
  * [![Standard Rebates for Multifamily Properties](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Multifamily-Standard-Rebates.jpg?rev=0b765c5ca2d349b3a6543fd8d54ced84&w=400&hash=722D66D651FC800C501843D82A78DAD2)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/rebate-and-finance-options/standard-rebates "Standard Rebates for Multifamily Properties")
### [Standard Rebates for Multifamily Properties](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/learn/rebate-and-finance-options/standard-rebates "Standard Rebates for Multifamily Properties")
Austin Energy’s Multifamily Rebate Program is designed to make energy efficiency upgrades easier and more cost-effective for multifamily properties. Energy efficiency measures can increase property values, reduce work orders, and decrease maintenance costs for properties.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

Austin Energy's Multifamily Rebates make energy-saving improvements easier and more cost effective for multifamily properties. Energy efficiency measures can increase property values and decrease maintenance costs.
  * [![Attic Insulation](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Offerings/Attic-Insulation.jpg?rev=792ae0529a274581bdf93930a7e649ad&w=400&hash=0594F1D891A9309A69F1B2276013E4ED)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/property-improvements/insulation "Attic Insulation")
### [Attic Insulation](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/property-improvements/insulation "Attic Insulation")
Earn a rebate to replace or upgrade your insulation and save on heating and cooling costs long term. Austin Energy will pay up to $1.31 per square foot of energy-efficient insulation you install.
  * [![Duct system Improvements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Offerings/Duct-System.jpg?rev=912dd7fbab8245d5a0bfc8def798d695&w=400&hash=ED1EEEE8B8B4430EFBBBE1D5DEB1705F)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/duct "Duct System Improvements")
### [Duct System Improvements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/duct "Duct System Improvements")
Leaky ducts in the average apartment unit may allow more than 30% of cooling to escape. Multifamily properties can earn rebates to repair or replace duct systems.
  * [![ECAD Incentive](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Offerings/ECAD-Incentive.jpg?rev=1d7d9463635d48a2955b34b516947e46&w=400&hash=F0E024AB82A2BC95A45E63D69C9AC5E2)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/property-improvements/ecad-incentive "ECAD Incentive")
### [ECAD Incentive](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/property-improvements/ecad-incentive "ECAD Incentive")
Austin Energy offers eligible multifamily properties a rebate up to $2,500 to help cover the cost of ECAD audits. These required audits can help you improve your property, reducing resident turnover and increasing marketability.
  * [![commercial charging while you shop](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/BusinessEVCharger_800x560.png?rev=3c9cec5f4ed74dcf9c36cf27e5638bc3&w=400&hash=F9FDAEA7987B46E37BC007DCC579B4F2)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/EV-Charger-Rebate "EV Charger Rebate")
### [EV Charger Rebate](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/EV-Charger-Rebate "EV Charger Rebate")
Get a rebate to cut costs on installing electric vehicle charging stations at your business, non-profit or multi-family property.
  * [![HVAC Replacement](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Offerings/MF-HVAC.jpg?rev=9722336e1a60401692841a69d9bafc0b&w=400&hash=AFE9B77B8B1E2DF0A6112920A08BD143)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/hvac "HVAC Replacement")
### [HVAC Replacement](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/hvac "HVAC Replacement")
Earn a rebate when you install new, energy-efficient HVAC equipment for your community.
  * [![HVAC Tune-Up](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Offerings/HVAC-Tune-Up.jpg?rev=e152216d5e4242b382f87d55ffd1fa66&w=400&hash=7176C9769A7E305E35CB8466652356B0)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/hvac-tune-up "HVAC Tune-Up")
### [HVAC Tune-Up](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/hvac-tune-up "HVAC Tune-Up")
Save on operating costs, maintenance and repairs and earn a rebate when you get your HVAC equipment tuned up. Austin Energy will pay up to $360 per system serviced.
  * [![solar charging while you park](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/CRS_Solar_Business_Header_800x560.jpg?rev=d49d31cc47594b8594df95b491d40973&w=400&hash=B2E07158C226AFF6E9EE518743AF30EF)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/Incentives-for-Solar-Systems "Incentives for Solar Systems")
### [Incentives for Solar Systems](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/Incentives-for-Solar-Systems "Incentives for Solar Systems")
Earn an incentive to reduce the cost of installing on-site solar.
  * [![LED Lighting](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Offerings/LED.jpg?rev=1ca461d0b1334aa893b3cdb728b96b73&w=400&hash=E26596E099C0B1A9B896297F7FB5752D)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/lighting/lighting "LED Lighting")
### [LED Lighting](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/lighting/lighting "LED Lighting")
Replace traditional lighting with energy-efficient fixtures throughout your rental units and earn rebates ranging from $2 to $19 per lamp.
  * [![Zilker Studios](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Offerings/ZilkerStudios.png?rev=9956d66d297c40ccabe56df3b85f02aa&w=400&hash=ADA0B7CBFA7AB305AB42C54DB9141BD5)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/New-Construction/Passive-Building-Incentive "Passive Building Incentive")
### [Passive Building Incentive](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/New-Construction/Passive-Building-Incentive "Passive Building Incentive")
Get paid to build sustainable, affordable housing in Austin. Participants can earn incentives for new multifamily developments that obtain a passive building certification from Phius.
  * [![Power Partner℠ Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Offerings/Res-Smart-Energy-Savings-Helps-Keep-Rates-Low.jpg?rev=3944b622017e4e488d4d51db63809bb1&w=400&hash=B5F7247F1E5D71C6D4CDDD72C91DED62)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner℠ Thermostats")
### [Power Partner℠ Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner℠ Thermostats")
Earn up to a $180 rebate for every eligible smart thermostat installed within your community.
  * [![Woman adjusting a smart thermostat](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Offerings/Woman-adjusting-thermostat.jpg?rev=5c1a7294052745669643263109dcc3da&w=400&hash=2DC6C6197DFA3FEDC1C3E72A87677490)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/Smart-Home-Rewards "Smart Home Rewards")
### [Smart Home Rewards](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/cooling-and-heating/Smart-Home-Rewards "Smart Home Rewards")
Get paid to make your community more energy efficient with smart thermostats and water heater leak detectors. Participating properties earn $5 per year for every eligible device installed, up to $10 per residence.
  * [![Solar Screens and Window Replacement](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Multifamily/Learn/Offerings/Solar-Screens-Window-Replacement.jpg?rev=ee024d6ef1ec447d9620bd2b486312c2&w=400&hash=9D55BB0F394C5801A02F313E9DFA2AAC)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/property-improvements/window "Solar Screens and Window Replacement")
### [Solar Screens and Window Replacement](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/property-improvements/window "Solar Screens and Window Replacement")
Earn rebates to install solar treatments or new windows in rental units. Austin Energy pays up to $3 per square foot of window treated or replaced.
  * [![commercial solar charging](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Commercial/Offerings/PalmerSolarSkyline_800x560.jpg?rev=c018af07fea64d23849308d28b4a8452&w=400&hash=D44A9AD06D9D85EEE19AA8BD83DDF99D)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/Solar-Standard-Offer-Program "Solar Standard Offer Program")
### [Solar Standard Offer Program](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/Solar-Standard-Offer-Program "Solar Standard Offer Program")
The Solar Standard Offer Program helps commercial businesses and properties install solar panels for the Community Solar program. Host customers can either install solar panels or lease their space to a third-party system owner. The owner of the solar system will be compensated by Austin Energy for the solar power generated.
  * [![Person working on laptop with dog](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/bill_breakdown_laptop.jpg?rev=31080604dd3644ba8d5bc057918e309e&w=400&hash=4C513196D1651F793F7DC78B6C7B6A3E)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/Value-of-Solar-Bill-Credit "Value of Solar Bill Credit")
### [Value of Solar Bill Credit](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings/Value-of-Solar-Bill-Credit "Value of Solar Bill Credit")
Earn bill credits for energy produced by on-site energy systems.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Ways to Save
## Residential
### Rebates & Incentives
#### Residential
  * Appliances and Equipment![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)

  * Cooling and Heating![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [Air Conditioning](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ac "Air Conditioning")
    * [Power Partner℠ Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner℠ Thermostats")

  * Home Improvements![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings "Home Energy Savings")

    * [Weatherization Assistance](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/weatherization "Weatherization Assistance")

  * Monitor Your Usage![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

Learn how Austin Energy residents save through ENERGY STAR® products, Smart Thermostats, City of Austin Utilities Online Customer Care, Austin Energy's Power Saver Program, Home Energy Savings, and Weatherization Assistance. 
  * [![Kids and dog in kiddie pool ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Be-a-PowerSaver-Volunteer/RES-Be-a-Power-Saver.jpg?rev=28be1d4a27754b82bd5a800377dcf68f&w=400&hash=F2550F5BB123DA22C7DC35DA790AB762)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/lower-your-usage/ps-volunteer "Be a Power Saver ")
### [Be a Power Saver](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/lower-your-usage/ps-volunteer "Be a Power Saver ")
Conserve energy during peak usage times to save on your electric bill and help lower costs and increase grid reliability for our entire community.
  * [![Manage Your Residential Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Manage-Your-Residential-Energy-Costs.jpg?rev=d02502f98dc94ede837738a697de97e5&w=400&hash=907CD09D9E53818080CC3F40C9826BB7)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "Manage Your Residential Energy Costs")
### [Manage Your Residential Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "Manage Your Residential Energy Costs")
Austin Energy offers tools to help residential customers monitor energy usage, get customized tips for saving energy, and set alerts to help avoid high bills.
  * [![Austin couple sitting on their front porch](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Save-Energy-for-What-Matters/Couple-sitting-in-front-of-house780.jpg?rev=9e1ea019ced6434d9336cca01519d020&w=400&hash=40F2712A0D6348B5383AD4337937F751)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/lower-your-usage/home-tips "More Rebates, More Savings")
### [More Rebates, More Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/lower-your-usage/home-tips "More Rebates, More Savings")
Whether you live in a house, a condo, or an apartment, you can try new habits to reduce your home energy usage.
  * [![Overhead view of houses with solar panels on rooftops and downtown buildings in background](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/PowerPartnerBatteryFAQ-Hero-800x560.jpg?rev=21ed7e3280a746bda01f75f5c6ea3939&w=400&hash=013C69BD8E55530EDD2D6D01068FC98C)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/Power-Partner-Battery-FAQs "Power Partner℠ Battery FAQs")
### [Power Partner℠ Battery FAQs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/Power-Partner-Battery-FAQs "Power Partner℠ Battery FAQs")
Earn rewards and help the community manage energy use on days when the demand is highest.
  * [![Power Partner℠ Program Helps Keep Rates Low](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Smart-Energy-Savings-Helps-Keep-Rates-Low.jpg?rev=7666c049be7144598ff37a18ebb2946e&w=400&hash=87F7A9850D1AFB85C5ED1AF58CEE1124)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/smart-energy-savings "Power Partner℠ FAQs")
### [Power Partner℠ Thermostat FAQs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/smart-energy-savings "Power Partner℠ FAQs")
Helping manage energy demand during our hot Austin summers has never been easier.
  * [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings")
### [Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings")
Home Energy Savings is a whole-home approach to energy efficiency that reduces your energy costs and increases home comfort. You can get rebates averaging $2,000 when you make qualifying improvements.
  * [![Smart Thermostats Allow Remote Control](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Power-Partner-Thermostats-Allow-Remote-Control.jpg?rev=6d9bc9b0bf6c480cab5456003585c4b3&w=400&hash=F38C0A7D1E0BE3288A6DBBA1D83EFE95)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/pp-thermostats "Smart Thermostats Allow Remote Control")
### [Smart Thermostats Allow Remote Control](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/pp-thermostats "Smart Thermostats Allow Remote Control")
Take control of your home's temperature and energy use by purchasing and installing a smart thermostat.
  * [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/weatherization-explained "Weatherization Assistance Explained")
### [Weatherization Assistance Explained](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/weatherization-explained "Weatherization Assistance Explained")
Austin Energy offers free weatherization improvements for eligible renters and homeowners. Learn what kinds of improvements qualify.


  * [](https://savings.austinenergy.com/contractors "Work with Austin Energy")

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# More Rebates, More Savings
## Save money at home with easy energy-saving tips
### Rebates & Incentives
#### Residential

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Austin couple sitting on their front porch](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Save-Energy-for-What-Matters/Couple-sitting-in-front-of-house780.jpg?rev=9e1ea019ced6434d9336cca01519d020&w=780&hash=1D7F3AB6FDC0D704BE38DA14C8B6D7C9)
Small changes can add up to big savings. Whether you live in a house, condo, or apartment, Austin Energy offers many ways to help you save energy and money.
Explore these resources to save energy at home. 
  * **Instant Savings** — Find [in-store discounts](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Get Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products") on select energy efficient products when you shop at local stores. Look for the green tag. 
  * **Weatherization Assistance** —Take a few minutes to see if you qualify for [free home energy improvements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/weatherization "Weatherization Assistance"). 
  * **[Smart Thermostat Rebates and Incentives](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat)** — Austin Energy offers a $30 rebate when you buy and install an eligible smart thermostat. Power Partners earn $50 upfront plus $25 annually for each eligible thermostat enrolled in the program. If your house, condo, or apartment already has a smart thermostat installed, you may also qualify for rewards as a [Power Partner](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat). 
  * **[Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings) ** — House 10+ years old? For a limited time, earn rebates averaging $2,600 plus access low-interest financing when you make whole-home energy improvements. 
  * [Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ac) — Get rebates starting at $400 on a new air conditioner or heat pump.
  * [Solar Screens](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/solar-screens) — Earn rebates of $1 per square foot on energy efficient solar screens for your home’s windows.
  * [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater) — Enjoy an [$800 rebate](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater) on ENERGY STAR® certified heat pump water heaters. 
  * **Online Usage Tools** — Monitor your energy usage regularly, get savings tips, and sign up for paperless billing by logging into [City of Austin Utilities Online Customer Care](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/home). 
  * **Customers with Solar Panels** — Access solar production information through [City of Austin Utilities Online Customer Care](https://coautilities.com/). 
  * **Utility Bill Help** — Residential customers facing financial challenges can receive [help with utility bills](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance/utility-bill-discounts).
  * **Energy Saving Tips** — [Discover useful ways to save energy at our YouTube playlist of videos.](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3x3FZ8cqx9CFDcSZ2sgJoCtSRlttNiSu) See our full list of tips below.


### Stay Warm During the Winter
  * Set your thermostat at 68 degrees or lower during winter weather. Lower the thermostat to 60 degrees when you are away for two hours or more on a cold day. 
  * Lower your thermostat when you leave home. You’ll use much less energy to heat the house while you are away.
  * Let the sunshine in. Open curtains and shades on eastern and southern windows during the day to let in more heat, then close them in the evening. 
  * Switch ceiling fans to run clockwise at a low speed on cooler days. This gentle updraft helps push warm air down into your living space. 
  * Maintain your fireplace. When not in use, make sure your fireplace damper is closed to prevent heat from escaping up the chimney.
  * Clean or change air filters monthly during seasons of high use. Dirty filters make your system work longer than necessary.
  * If you have central air and heat, do not close vents in unused rooms. This could increase pressure and cause duct leaks.
  * Add insulation to water heaters and hot water pipes to save energy and money.
  * Caulk and weatherstrip windows and doors to prevents drafts.


### Stay Cool During the Summer 
  * Raise your thermostat by a few degrees in the summer. Aim for 78 degrees or higher for the biggest energy savings. Set your thermostat to 85 degrees when you are away for two hours or more on a hot day.  
  

  * Point fans in your direction to make temperatures around you feel about 4 degrees cooler. In the summer, switch ceiling fans to run counterclockwise to push cool air downward. Only keep fans on when you are in the room.   
  

  * Clean your AC condenser/evaporator coils. Clean coils lower your energy costs, extend the unit’s life, and provide cleaner air for you to breathe. 
  * Keep debris and high grass away from the condenser. These obstacles block airflow, which makes the condenser work harder and run longer. 
  * Close shades and curtains on windows hit by direct sunlight to prevent heat from getting indoors. 
  * Provide shade for outside AC units. AC units shaded by trees or other means work more efficiently and use up to 10% less electricity. 
  * Plant trees to shade south and west-facing windows. Trees can reduce indoor air temperatures as much as 20 degrees, saving up to 40% on cooling costs. 
  * Avoid turning on the oven during the hottest time of the day. Using the microwave produces less heat. 


### Enjoy Free Home Energy Improvements
Austin Energy’s Weatherization Assistance provides free home energy improvements to eligible customers. Whether you rent or own, these free improvements can help make your home more comfortable and energy efficient, saving you money year-round.
[Learn more about Weatherization Assistance](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/weatherization-explained) and take a few minutes to apply today.
###  Manage Air Conditioning & Heating
  * Clean or change air filters monthly during seasons of high use. Dirty filters make your system work longer than necessary. 
  * If you have central air and heat, do not close vents in unused rooms. This could increase pressure and cause duct leaks. 
  * If you have a window unit, close off unused rooms. 
  * Use a smart thermostat to save energy and money. Austin Energy offers rebates and incentives to renters and homeowners who enroll in the voluntary [Power Partner program](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/smart-energy-savings). 
  * Consider new high efficiency air conditioners. They use up to 40% less electricity than older models.


###  **Light Up Your Home for Less**
  * Install LED light bulbs. ENERGY STAR® qualified LEDs produce light up to 90% more efficiently than incandescent light bulbs. 
  * Use task lights instead of lighting an entire room. 
  * Use dusk to dawn sensors on your outdoor lights. 
  * Turn off unneeded lights, even when leaving a room for a short time. Lighting accounts for about 10% of your energy use. 


[Get instant, in-store savings on LEDs and other energy-efficient products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Instant In-Store Savings on Energy-Efficient Products")
###  **Don’t Let Your Electronics Waste Energy**
  * Unplug appliances, chargers, and electronic devices when you are not using them. They use energy even when turned off. 
  * Use power strips in home offices, entertainment centers, and other areas. Turn the strip off when not in use. 
  * Purchase a [smart strip](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Get Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products") that powers only the devices that need to stay on. 
  * Use timers on surge protectors when they are difficult to access. 
  * Use [ENERGY STAR](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Get Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products")® products. 
  * Only keep fans on when you are in the room. 
  * Enjoy a [$300 rebate](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pool-pump) on eligible variable speed pool pumps. 


###  **Manage Energy Use with Laundry and Dishes**
  * Run washing machines and dishwashers on a full load. 
  * Choose the air dry cycle on your dishwasher. 
  * Dry loads of clothes back-to-back to take advantage of heat built up in the dryer. 
  * Clean the lint filter after every load. Your dryer will dry more efficiently, requiring less running time. 


###  **Control Your Water Heater**
  * Set the temperature no higher than 120 degrees to save around $45 a year. 
  * Wrap your water heater with an insulation blanket. This can reduce energy use by 10% to 15%. An insulating blanket will pay for itself in less than a year. 
  * Switch to an ENERGY STAR® certified heat pump water heater. Enjoy energy bill savings and an [$800 rebate](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater) from Austin Energy. 
  * Consider installing a timer on your water heater to heat water only at set times. 


###  **Cook and Cool Smart in the Kitchen**
  * Check your refrigerator and freezer temperatures. You can save up to 25% by setting your refrigerator temperature between 35 and 38 degrees and your freezer to 0 degrees.
  * Gently vacuum the refrigerator's condenser coils about every three months. Excessive dust buildup makes the refrigerator work harder and run longer. The coils are in the back or under the bottom of the refrigerator. 
  * Make sure your refrigerator and freezer doors seal properly. To test, close the door over a dollar bill. If the dollar pulls out easily, you may need to replace the seal around the door or adjust the door latch. 
  * Let food cool before placing in refrigerator (unless the recipe says otherwise). Warm food will cause your refrigerator to run more. 
  * Cook outdoors, use a slow cooker, or use the microwave to save energy. Microwaves use up to 80% less energy, cook food up to 75% faster, and produce less heat than an electric or gas oven. 
  * Use the oven light to check on food instead of opening the oven door. Oven temperature drops by 25 to 30 degrees every time you open the oven door, which slows cooking. 
  * If you are using your oven for an hour or more, turn on the stove exhaust to help remove heat. 
  * Never place aluminum foil on an oven bottom. The foil may block heat or air circulation and reduce the oven temperature by as much as 50 degrees. 
  * Cook with lids on pots to reduce energy use and heat. This will bring liquids to a boil more quickly and will allow continued cooking at lower temperature settings. 
  * Use glass and ceramic pans. They retain heat better than metal pans and can lower the baking temperature by 25 degrees. 
  * Cover exhaust fans when not in use. An open kitchen exhaust fan allows hot/cold outside air to come into your home. Low-cost covers are available to cover exhaust fan openings.


### Get Utility Bill Help 
The City of Austin's Customer Assistance Program helps customers facing financial challenges or serious medical problems. Find out if you qualify:
  * [Utility Bill Discounts](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance/utility-bill-discounts)
  * [Financial Support Plus 1](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance/plus-1)
  * [Payment Arrangements](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/payment-arrangement)
  * [Services for the Medically Vulnerable](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance/services-medically-vulnerable)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

# Be a Power Saver
## Help lighten the energy load.
### Rebates & Incentives
#### Residential
  * Appliances and Equipment![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)

### Ways to Save
#### Residential
  * Monitor Your Usage![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [Manage Your Residential Energy Costs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "Manage Your Residential Energy Costs")
    * [Smart Thermostats Allow Remote Control](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/pp-thermostats "Smart Thermostats Allow Remote Control")
    * [Power Partner℠ Thermostat FAQs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/smart-energy-savings "Power Partner℠ FAQs")
    * [Power Partner℠ Battery FAQs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/Power-Partner-Battery-FAQs "Power Partner℠ Battery FAQs")
  * Lower Your Usage![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [More Rebates, More Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/lower-your-usage/home-tips "More Rebates, More Savings")
    * [Be a Power Saver](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/lower-your-usage/ps-volunteer "Be a Power Saver ")
  * Maximize Your Energy Savings![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings")
    * [Weatherization Assistance Explained](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/weatherization-explained "Weatherization Assistance Explained")


### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Kids and dog in kiddie pool ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Be-a-PowerSaver-Volunteer/RES-Be-a-Power-Saver.jpg?rev=28be1d4a27754b82bd5a800377dcf68f&w=780&hash=D95CF2EB9A65AA03A239C53DB1B32151)
Conserve energy during peak usage times to save on your electric bill, lower energy costs and increase grid reliability for our community.
### What is the Power Saver program?
In the heat of summer, energy costs and electricity demand can rise along with the temperature. To help manage this high demand for energy, Austin Energy is asking select customers to participate in our Power Saver program. This program notifies participants in advance of Peak Energy Demand Days and asks them to save power. The program is completely voluntary, and how much you reduce your electric use is completely up to you. 
### What is a Peak Energy Demand Day?
A Peak Energy Demand Day happens when the demand for electricity is anticipated to be especially high, typically on the hottest summer days. This rising demand often means rising wholesale energy costs.
By using less energy on these peak days, Power Saver participants can help lower energy costs for our community. The Power Saver program notifies participants before expected Peak Energy Demand Days so they can plan ahead.
### Why was I selected to participate?
Austin Energy randomly selected customers from all areas of the utility’s service territory. Customers who opt-out will not be able to rejoin the Power Saver program in 2025.
### How does it work?
Power Saver participants will receive a notification on or before a Peak Energy Demand Day, asking them to save energy between 1 to 7 p.m. and offering tips on how to do so.
Following a Peak Energy Demand Day, you’ll receive another notification, letting you know how much energy you used and how your home compared to similar homes in your neighborhood.
### How will I receive Power Saver notifications?
Power Saver notifications are available through email, text message or phone call. You can manage your Power Saver [communication preferences](https://coautilities.com/go/notifications) – or opt-out of the program entirely – by visiting the _Notifications_ section of your City of Austin Utilities online account. 
### How do I save energy?
Take simple steps to reduce your electric use:
  * **Minimize appliance use:** Delay using larger appliances like your dryer or dishwasher until after a Peak Energy Demand Day is over.
  * **Raise your thermostat temperature:** Adjusting your thermostat by just a few degrees can make a big difference!
  * **Use fans and reduce AC use:** Using fans and keeping blinds and curtains closed are great ways to help cool your home.


Even small changes can make a big difference on Peak Energy Demand Days.
### Where can I get more energy saving tips?
Log into your City of Austin Utilities account to find more [ways to save energy](https://dss-coa.opower.com/dss/energy/ways-to-save). Take our [Home Energy Analysis questionnaire](https://dss-coa.opower.com/dss/energy/analysis) for customized tips.
Visit [austinenergy.com/rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/) for more energy conservation opportunities.
**Have other questions? Call 512-494-9400.**
Date last reviewed or modified: 05/30/2025

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.
