### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

###  Weatherize to Lower Energy Costs and Improve the Comfort, Health, and Safety of Your Home 
[Weatherization Assistance](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/weatherization "Weatherization Assistance") provides free home energy improvements to eligible customers. 
####  Apply online for Weatherization Assistance 
  * [Weatherization Assistance Program Application](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_english)
  * [En español: Solicitud del programa de asistencia de climatización](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_spanish)


Questions? Call 512-482-5346 or email Weatherization
###  What are Home Energy Improvements? 
Home energy improvements, such as attic insulation and duct repair, are also known as home weatherization. These improvements help make your home energy-efficient, safer and healthier. The result is a home that stays cooler in the summer and warmer in the winter.
###  Why are Home Energy Improvements Important? 
  * Saves energy and money on electric bills 
  * Improves indoor air quality by reducing allergens and indoor air pollutants 
  * Seals up gaps and cracks, which helps reduces the movement of air and the entry of pests 
  * Increases comfort by lowering the humidity in the home and maintaining a steady indoor temperature from one room to the other 
  * Improves your home’s energy efficiency 


###  What Improvements Will My Home Receive? 
![Austin Energy’s Weatherization Assistance Program](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/WeatherizationHouse-Resized.jpg?rev=9a10d9b74e354fd7a280ddb1ac7ea24a&hash=11FA3A760B43E311C5C7502E55E5F2DC)
_The illustration shows the areas of the house that may be included as part of Austin Energy’s Weatherization Assistance Program._
####  1 - Health and Safety 
New carbon monoxide and smoke detectors improve health and safety. 
####  2 - Sealing Gaps and Cracks 
Sealing outside doors, plumbing and electrical connections can prevent pests and pollutants from entering the home. It also keeps conditioned air from escaping outside. 
####  3 - Attic Insulation 
If current attic insulation levels are low (less than 10”), extra insulation can help keep your home cool in the summer and warm in the winter. 
####  4 - Solar Screens 
Replacing existing window screens with solar screens can reduce the amount of heat that enters the home, keeping rooms cooler in the summer. 
####  5 - Duct Repair/Replacement 
Repairing or replacing ductwork that is old, damaged, or poorly sized can help fix problems with heating and cooling your home. 
####  6 - High Efficiency Lighting 
LED lighting requires less energy to operate, which can help lower electricity bills. 
####  7 - Air Conditioning Equipment Inspection and Cleaning 
Inspecting and cleaning an air conditioning unit can help it run more efficiently and extend its life. 
####  8 - Smart Thermostat 
Smart thermostats let you adjust your home's temperature from anywhere using your mobile device or computer. Smart thermostats can also help you create schedules to automate your heating and cooling, saving you energy and money.
###  Now Offering a Rebate and Loan for the Purchase of a New Air Conditioning System 
For customers who participate in Weatherization Assistance, Austin Energy offers a rebate and 0% financing for up to 10 years on a new air conditioning system. 
Please talk with your Austin Energy inspector and participating contractor during your home assessment if you are interested in rebates and financing for a new air conditioning system. 
###  Get Started 
  * [See if you're eligible for Weatherization Assistance](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/weatherization)
  * Apply online for Weatherization Assistance: 
    * [Weatherization Assistance Program Application](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_english)
    * [En español: Solicitud del programa de asistencia de climatización](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/weatherization_assistance_program_application_spanish)
  * Questions? Call 512-482-5346 or email Weatherization


###  Learn More 
  * [Manage your energy costs with the Austin Energy App](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app)
  * [Save money at home with easy energy-saving tips](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/lower-your-usage/home-tips)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings
## Receive rebates on home energy improvements for houses 10+ years old
### Rebates & Incentives
#### Residential
  * Appliances and Equipment![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

Home Energy Savings is a whole-home approach to energy efficiency that reduces your energy costs and increases home comfort. 
## Limited Time Offer Rebates Now Available
We’ve increased our AC and Heat Pump rebates. Starting Dec. 1st, you can achieve rebates averaging $3,000 for qualifying projects. 
**Need Help with Financing?** Austin Energy works with [Velocity Credit Union](https://www.velocitycu.com/loans/austin-energy/) to provide for Home Energy Savings projects. For a limited time, December 1st – April 30th, access a 0% APR loan through our partners at Velocity Credit Union! Applicable rebates will apply to the project cost, reducing your total loan amount.
Ask your Home Energy Savings participating contractor about these rebate and loan options to help you complete your project.
Click the _Find a Contractor_ tab to get started today.
## Get Started Today
Take the Home Energy Quiz to have a trusted energy advisor identify qualifying improvements with a no-cost, in-home energy assessment.
[ Take the Home Energy Quiz ](https://austinenergyapp.com/HomeEnergyQuiz "residential home savings quiz")
Are you ready to begin improvements? You can contact a participating contractor to get started.
[Find a Participating Contractor](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings)
### What Improvements Qualify? 
Customers will need to complete at least three home energy improvements to qualify for rebates. Improvements may include whole-home air sealing, HVAC replacement, duct sealing or replacement, attic insulation, and solar screen installation.
### The Benefits of Home Energy Savings
Home energy improvements can provide you with a more comfortable, more energy efficient home. You’ll enjoy cleaner indoor air and an average of 20% savings on summer energy bills.
![Benefits of Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Save-Energy-Increase-Comfort/home-details_1000x500.jpg?rev=4bc69263aa2e4db4814206633ab33778&hash=9E452C0FFFB2266B136C18B8BA36AD96)
### Improvements may include: 
  

![hvac work](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Save-Energy-Increase-Comfort/HVAC_Hexicon_300x300.png?rev=90ad36cf04f74c4bad28a478df687511&hash=30249A05D23CE233C6C8EF2FF4F8F8A9)
Replacing inefficient, incorrectly sized HVAC systems, including air conditioners and heat pumps
![duct work](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Save-Energy-Increase-Comfort/DUCTWORK_hexicon_300x300.png?rev=046bf705cb1c40caaf6ecb6e4eb17172&hash=212E341E21F9541A7605FD73FA4A33A7)
Fixing old, unsealed air ducts and adding attic insulation 
![weather work](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Save-Energy-Increase-Comfort/Weather_hexicon_300x300.png?rev=254077e4d5ba40168404dd3a4c86a964&hash=D853EE9AD452BC1B36ECAFCC5449F56A)
Weatherstripping doors and windows and installing solar shading on windows
![hvac work](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Save-Energy-Increase-Comfort/HVAC_Hexicon_300x300.png?rev=90ad36cf04f74c4bad28a478df687511&hash=30249A05D23CE233C6C8EF2FF4F8F8A9)
Installing a smart thermostat
  

### Hear from some of our satisfied Home Energy Savings customers:
  

> “Easy process, helpful staff, thrilled with our results.”
  

> “The process of making your residence energy efficient is worth the effort and expense. Aside from the benefit of lower utility bills, the rebates take the edge off the expense. If you work with a company that updates your HVAC, they will help you through the rebate process. It's a win-win any way you look at it.”
  

> “My entire HVAC unit needed to be replaced. Being on fixed income, cost was a big part of my decision. With Austin Energy’s rebates, the cost was much more affordable.”
  

> “The rebate makes it easy to pull the switch for a more energy efficient home.”
  

**Join thousands of satisfied Austin Energy customers by starting your[Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings) project today.**
  

### Frequently Asked Questions
  * What improvements qualify for Home Energy Savings?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Customers must complete at least three home energy saving improvements which include whole-home air sealing, HVAC replacement, duct sealing or replacement, attic insulation, and solar screen installation.
  * What is the no-cost in-home energy assessment?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
For qualifying homes, customers can have a trusted energy advisor complete a visual in-home energy assessment to identify the home’s opportunities for improvements and rebates.
  * Why is a new air conditioner not enough to keep my home energy efficient?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
A new air conditioner is just one part of maintaining an energy efficient home. Home Energy Savings can help identify other areas of improvement to seal up your home and optimize your heating and cooling system. These improvements will help keep your house cool in the summer and warm in the winter, which reduces your monthly energy use and costs.
  * How do I know if I can participate?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
If your home is more than ten years old and you have not participated in Home Energy Savings (previously Home Performance with ENERGY STAR) within the last ten years, you may be eligible to participate. To view the full list of eligibility requirements, please see the [Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings)  _Eligibility_ tab.
  * How do I select a participating contractor?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
You can select from our list of participating contractors on the [Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings)  _Find a Contractor_ tab.
  * What is the typical total project cost?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Project costs vary based on each individual home’s needs. Austin Energy recommends contacting at least three different contractors for estimates.
  * What types of rebates and financing options are available?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Austin Energy offers rebates averaging $2,000 when you work with a participating contractor. Austin Energy also works with Velocity Credit Union to provide low-interest financing for Home Energy Savings projects. Please see the [Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings)  _Eligibility_ tab for more details.
  * How is Home Energy Savings different from the Weatherization Assistance Program?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Home Energy Savings is a market-based, whole home efficiency program. The Weatherization Assistance Program provides free home energy improvements to eligible customers.   
  
[Learn more about eligibility requirements for the Weatherization Assistance Program](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/weatherization)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Smart Thermostats Allow Remote Control](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Power-Partner-Thermostats-Allow-Remote-Control.jpg?rev=6d9bc9b0bf6c480cab5456003585c4b3&w=780&hash=7FF3FDFE1CCA74455E05309DC66DC2C2)
Smart thermostats can help you save energy and money. Austin Energy offers rebates and incentives to help you save even more.
## Increased Incentive for Residential Customers 
For a limited time, **save up to $155** when you enroll in Power Partner and purchase a new eligible smart thermostat. 
Become a Power Partner:  
**Earn $75** when you enroll your eligible thermostat in Power Partner  
**Plus, receive $30 every year** for each eligible thermostat you keep enrolled 
Save on your purchase:   
**Enjoy a $50 rebate*** on a new eligible smart thermostat. 
*Thermostat rebate increased from $30 to $50 as of November 24, 2025. 
With a smart thermostat, you can adjust your thermostat from anywhere using your computer or mobile device. Smart thermostats let you create schedules to automate your heating and cooling. Some models even integrate with other home automation devices. 
###  Earn $50 When You Buy and Install a Smart Thermostat 
Earn a **$50 rebate** from Austin Energy for buying and installing a new smart thermostat. 
  1. View the list of [eligible thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat/#approvedPPT "Eligible Thermostats in the Power Partner Program"). 
  2. [Apply for your $50 rebate](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#enrollment/?programId=4&cm_sp=EEC-AEP-_-Application-_-null "Appliance Efficiency Program Application Form") within 90 days of purchase. You’ll need: 


  * Your receipt. 
  * Your thermostat manufacturer, model, and serial number. 
  * Your Austin Energy Account number. 


### Earn A Bill Credit For Each Thermostat You Enroll in Power Partner℠ 
Enjoy rewards and help keep energy affordable for everyone. When you become a Power Partner, you join thousands who reduce their energy use when the demand for energy spikes.
  * [Learn more about Power Partner](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/smart-energy-savings "Learn more about the Power Partner Program")


###  Other Ways to Save on Your Electric Bill 
Austin Energy offers [rebates and incentives](https://savings.austinenergy.com/) to help you save on heating and cooling costs. 
Check your energy usage regularly to avoid surprises on your energy bill. You can view your home electric usage anywhere you have internet access simply by logging in to [City of Austin Utilities Online Customer Care](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/home). You can compare your usage to the previous month or year or to similar homes in your neighborhood. You can also set alerts for higher billing tiers and receive customized energy savings tips. 
For an even deeper dive into your usage, including solar panel production info, access the [Austin Energy Web App](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/res-app "use our free, interactive web app"). 
###  Learn More 
  * [Smart Thermostat Rebates and Incentives](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner Thermostats")
  * [Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort)
  * [Save money at home with easy energy-saving tips](https://austinenergy.com/residential/save-money-and-energy/enjoy-summer-savings)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Power Partner℠ Thermostat FAQs
## Customer participation helps manage community energy demand

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Power Partner℠ Program Helps Keep Rates Low](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Smart-Energy-Savings-Helps-Keep-Rates-Low.jpg?rev=7666c049be7144598ff37a18ebb2946e&w=780&hash=DD59D96E514674F198B4F92EAF2C5391)
Whether you rent or own your home, the voluntary Power Partner program rewards you for each smart thermostat you enroll.
## Increased Incentive for Residential Customers
Save up to $155 when you enroll in Power Partner and purchase a new eligible smart thermostat. 
Become a Power Partner:  
**Earn $75** when you enroll your eligible thermostat in Power Partner  
**Plus, receive $30 every year** for each eligible thermostat you keep enrolled 
Save on your purchase:   
**Enjoy a $50 rebate*** on a new eligible smart thermostat. 
*Thermostat rebate increased from $30 to $50 as of November 24, 2025.
  * What is Austin Energy’s Power Partner Thermostat program?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
The voluntary Power Partner program helps the community manage energy use during periods of peak energy demand. During these periods, enrolled Power Partner thermostats are adjusted by a few degrees, reducing both electricity costs and strain on the grid.
Power Partner applicants receive a $75 bill credit for each eligible thermostat plus $30 annually for each thermostat that remains enrolled. Incentives may change during seasonal promotions. (Austin Energy also offers a separate [$50 rebate](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/pp-thermostats) for buying and installing a new eligible smart thermostat.)
Power Partner events typically occur for two hours between 3:00 and 6:00 p.m. during the summer (June 1 through Sept. 30). Austin Energy may conduct events outside of these windows, between 6:00 a.m. And 10:00 p.m., and for longer durations, including but not limited to winter and year-round extreme weather circumstances. Austin Energy may also periodically conduct tests throughout the year, usually lasting no longer than one hour. Like typical energy conservation events, customers can easily opt out of these using their device or app. Participants may easily opt out of events without penalty through their thermostat or thermostat app.
  * Who can join Power Partner?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Residential customers (both homeowners and renters) and small businesses with active Austin Energy accounts can enroll in Power Partner with an eligible smart thermostat.
[Enroll in Power Partner](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat)
Commercial customers can participate in Austin Energy's [Commercial Demand Response program](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings/load-management/commercial-demand-response).
  * How do I know if I am eligible for the Power Partner program?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
You can participate in the Power Partner program if you have one or more eligible smart thermostats. You must also be an Austin Energy customer with a unique account number. Co-op and master-metered accounts are not eligible at this time.
Other requirements include:
    * Existing equipment must be connected and operational.
    * You must have a standard air conditioning system (split system, package unit, or heat pump).
    * The heater component may be gas or electric.
    * Your air conditioning equipment must be in good mechanical condition and controlled by an approved, communicating thermostat device.
    * Homeowners and renters are eligible to receive the Power Partner participation bill credit. Homeowners and renters may also receive the purchase and installation rebate if they purchased and installed the thermostat.
    * Landlords are not eligible for Power Partner (but may be eligible for a separate [$50 rebate](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/pp-thermostats) for newly purchased and installed eligible devices).
    * Applicants are limited to five (5) thermostats.
  * I am a landlord whose rental property’s electric account is in my name. Can I enroll this property’s devices in Power Partner?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
No, only occupants of a premises (with electric accounts in their names) are eligible.
  * After submitting my application, when will I be notified of my status in the program?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Austin Energy will provide email confirmation of your status in the program, typically within four weeks of applying.
  * Can I enroll in both Power Partner Thermostat and Power Partner EV?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Yes! Please visit [Power Partner EV](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/plug-in-austin/power-partner-ev) for more information.
  * How will I receive my program incentive?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * The $75 enrollment incentive (for each eligible thermostat) will be issued in the form of an Austin Energy electric bill credit within 1-2 billing cycles after acceptance. Incentives may change during seasonal promotions.
    * You will receive an additional $30 credit after one year of remaining in the program and every subsequent year for each device that stays enrolled in Power Partner. Customers will typically receive their annual incentives within 1 to 2 billing cycles of their enrollment anniversary date, subject to additional delays due to the volume of total program payouts in a given month. For example, if you enrolled your thermostat in June, you would receive your annual $30 incentive between July and August of the following year.
  * What can I expect during a Power Partner event?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
When Austin Energy initiates a Power Partner event, your thermostat will be adjusted by up to 4 degrees. During the summer, Power Partner events are preceded by 30 minutes of pre-cooling of two degrees to help prolong your initial comfort level.
  * When do Power Partner Events typically occur?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Most Power Partner events occur during the summer (June 1–Sept. 30). Austin Energy may conduct events outside of these windows, such as extreme winter weather circumstances.
  * How will I know when a Power Partner Thermostat event is in progress?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Notifications will usually appear in two ways: (1) on the smart thermostat screen and/or (2) within the manufacturer’s smart thermostat app on a mobile device.
Note: Austin Energy does not send Power Partner event notifications, which are set by the thermostat manufacturer. Manufacturers may or may not provide notifications prior to a Power Partner event.
  * Where can I go to find out if my thermostat is eligible for the program![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
The Power Partner Thermostat program has partnered with a variety of common household thermostat brands. [View a list of which models and brands are compatible](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat) (see the _Eligibility_ tab).
  * Can I enroll multiple thermostats?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Applicants are limited to five (5) thermostats. New members of the program can earn a $50 bill credit for each eligible thermostat.
  * What if I don't want to participate in a Power Partner Thermostat event?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
You can override Power Partner events at any time by simply adjusting the temperature on your thermostat or thermostat app. You will not be penalized for opting out of an event.
  * How can I permanently opt out of Power Partner Thermostat?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Customers who wish to permanently end their participation in Power Partner events may submit a [Power Partner Opt Out request](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/ppt_opt_out). Doing so will disqualify you from earning an annual incentive.
  * Where can I find the terms and conditions for this program?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
View the terms and conditions for Power Partner on [EnergyHub’s website](https://www.energyhub.com/terms).
  * Who can I contact if I have additional questions about the Power Partner Thermostat program?![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
Please email the Austin Energy Power Partner Program.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Rebates & Incentives
## Residential
### Rebates & Incentives
#### Residential
  * Appliances and Equipment![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heaters")
    * [Pool Pumps](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pool-pump "Pool Pumps")
    * [Power Partner℠ Battery](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pp-battery "Power Partner℠ Battery")
  * Cooling and Heating![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * [Air Conditioning](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ac "Air Conditioning")

  * Monitor Your Usage![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)

    * [Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort "Save Energy and Increase Comfort with Home Energy Savings")

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

Austin Energy's Residential Rebates can help make your home more comfortable and energy efficient. From simple improvements to whole-home energy upgrades, Austin Energy offers many ways to help you save.
  * [![Air Conditioning](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-HP-Air-Conditioner.jpg?rev=67328b974378430d88153da173974656&w=400&hash=1CFBCD5A91BE9A29478EDB8384D800A5)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ac "Air Conditioning")
### [Air Conditioning](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ac "Air Conditioning")
Earn a rebate averaging $800 to install a new, energy efficient air conditioning system.
  * [![Get Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Get-Instant-Savings-on-Energy-Efficient-Products.jpg?rev=aecd7842142342ca89f5210533fabe40&w=400&hash=088E4613E274CAD842D6EE5AD9C8F1A0)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Get Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products")
### [Get Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/instant-savings "Get Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products")
Saving money and energy go hand-in-hand when you buy select products at participating local stores.
  * [![Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-HP-Water-Heater.jpg?rev=238203efb37f4f69bfae311b15267354&w=400&hash=B709F47F78C3593ED4B5F24069557F0C)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heaters")
### [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heaters")
Earn an $800 rebate to install an ENERGY STAR® certified Hybrid Electric Water Heater, also referred to as High-Efficiency Heat Pump Water Heater.
  * [![Image showing different sections of an energy efficient house](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/EES_26_3745_HES_house_1200x600.jpg?rev=d06279f590994543950c93c66a536504&w=400&hash=745ACB0DE63330A75C6CF4A07345A3AA)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings "Home Energy Savings")
### [Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/home-energy-savings "Home Energy Savings")
Earn rebates averaging $3000 and access 0% financing on whole-home energy improvements.
  * [![Austin Home](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-HPwES-House/Home-Energy-Savings-house2/Home_Energy_Savings_house_retouched-small.jpg?rev=99842000b5264c9287780604b8c07140&w=400&hash=3C094C680E690EFD421AB22E19363F38)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/Home-Energy-Savings-Essential "Home Energy Savings Essential")
### [Home Energy Savings Essential](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/Home-Energy-Savings-Essential "Home Energy Savings Essential")
Access a lower-cost alternative to the standard Home Energy Savings program. Earn rebates averaging $1,500 to upgrade your home to use less energy and lower your electricity bills.
  * [![Pool Pump](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-Pool-Pump.jpg?rev=36649f7165f44989a3965a12be7f56fe&w=400&hash=A5590A62F51C99E2FDC89B9778ED55E7)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pool-pump "Pool Pumps")
### [Pool Pumps](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pool-pump "Pool Pumps")
Earn a $300 rebate to install an ENERGY STAR® certified variable-speed pool pump. 
  * [![House with battery system in garage](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/PowerPartnerBatteryHero-800x560.jpg?rev=36cdac7009964905bc542eee1ecdc0e7&w=400&hash=BC6F97E2A3A4598E09998468E1AC64AD)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pp-battery "Power Partner℠ Battery")
### [Power Partner℠ Battery](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pp-battery "Power Partner℠ Battery")
Earn rewards averaging $750 when you enroll approved backup batteries in Power Partner Battery.
  * [![ Power Partner℠ Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-PPT-Offering.jpg?rev=98d9dbdbd30f4a4baaefaef74b496873&w=400&hash=92DB154BD3DC1823C3C95FB51FD43EE3)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner℠ Thermostats")
### [Power Partner℠ Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner℠ Thermostats")
Get rebates for smart thermostats and earn up to $75 in bill credits when you enroll in Power Partner. 
  * [![residential solar charging](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Solar_Home-800x560.jpg?rev=399500a12784402697d7a976c29ffc2a&w=400&hash=7E6944CB1E9C7FCF9C1FA793E44E19E5)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/Residential-Solar-Rebate "Residential Solar Rebate")
### [Residential Solar Rebate](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/Residential-Solar-Rebate "Residential Solar Rebate")
Earn a $2,500 rebate by completing our solar education course and installing a qualifying solar system on your home.
  * [![Solar Screens](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-Solar-Screens.jpg?rev=4c47a2ed4aca4271995c5d53ab6d1301&w=400&hash=D63F784CADF2BCC88823D789926D953B)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/solar-screens "Solar Screens")
### [Solar Screens](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/solar-screens "Solar Screens")
Earn a rebate to install energy-efficient solar screens in your home’s windows.
  * [![Person working on laptop with dog](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/bill_breakdown_laptop.jpg?rev=31080604dd3644ba8d5bc057918e309e&w=400&hash=4C513196D1651F793F7DC78B6C7B6A3E)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/Value-of-Solar-Bill-Credit "Value of Solar Bill Credit")
### [Value of Solar Bill Credit](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/Value-of-Solar-Bill-Credit "Value of Solar Bill Credit")
Earn bill credits for energy produced by on-site energy systems.
  * [![Weatherization assistance](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Weatherization-hero-800x560.jpg?rev=c67544808ee8449ca705605066b4f38e&w=400&hash=BB68EE0B0C1F4E5FFC47839A90724130)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/weatherization "Weatherization Assistance")
### [Weatherization Assistance](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/weatherization "Weatherization Assistance")
Austin Energy offers free home energy improvements to eligible renters and homeowners. Apply in minutes.
  * [![Window Air Conditioners](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-Window-Unit-AC.jpg?rev=086c2d3ea04a48338fb1d4942dcccab2&w=400&hash=5F2843FE9098CE18F8BB44647591EB7F)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/window-ac "Window Air Conditioners")
### [Window Air Conditioners](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/window-ac "Window Air Conditioners")
Earn a $50 rebate when you buy an ENERGY STAR® certified window air conditioner.

# Heat Pump Water Heaters

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Save Money &amp;amp; Energy](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/saveMoneyIcon.png?rev=2b1b281496e04fe7a0a742e47063c371&w=100&hash=67157C959E7182DF29B2FC48F4EBC8D4)
Save Money & Energy
Saving energy and money go hand-in-hand. We can all contribute to reducing Austin’s energy demand by making simple lifestyle changes and energy-efficient home improvements. When demand decreases, we all save. Austin Energy is committed to helping our customers achieve the greatest savings possible.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Save Money & Energy")
![Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-HP-Water-Heater.jpg?rev=238203efb37f4f69bfae311b15267354&w=780&hash=C9B7D88473528B6659661378303975CA)
Earn an $800 rebate on a qualifying ENERGY STAR® certified heat pump water heater.
  * Description
  * Incentive
  * Eligibility
  * How to Apply


Installing a new water heater? Consider a heat pump water heater for maximum energy savings. Austin Energy offers an $800 rebate when you install a [qualifying ENERGY STAR® certified hybrid/heat pump water heater](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-water-heaters/results "qualifying ENERGY STAR® hybrid/heat pump water heater"). 
Heat pump water heaters, also known as hybrid electric water heaters, efficiently transfer heat instead of creating it. This method is three to four times more efficient than that of traditional water heaters. Switching to a heat pump water heater can add up to big savings: 
  * Austin Energy rebate of $800 
  * [Estimated annual energy savings up to $350](https://www.energystar.gov/products/water_heaters/high_efficiency_electric_storage_water_heaters/benefits_savings "Estimated annual energy savings")


Learn more about choosing a heat pump water heater by visiting [ENERGY STAR](https://www.energystar.gov/products/heat_pump_water_heaters "ENERGY STAR certified product buying guide"). 
###  Other Energy Efficiency Incentives 
Austin Energy also offers rebates for the following equipment that can improve energy efficiency in your home: 
  * [Air Conditioning](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ac "Air Conditioning")
  * [Window Air Conditioners](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/window-ac "Window Air Conditioners")
  * [Pool Pumps](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pool-pump "Pool Pumps")
  * [Power Partner Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Power Partner Thermostat Program")
  * [Solar Screens](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/solar-screens)


Austin Energy offers an $800 rebate on qualifying heat pump water heaters. To find a qualifying heat pump water heater, visit the [ENERGY STAR® Find and Compare Products webpage](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-water-heaters/ "ENERGY STAR Find and Compare Products") and search for heat pump water heaters that meet the program requirements. 
###  Prerequisites 
  * The heat pump water heater must be installed in a home that has or will have permanent electric service from Austin Energy. 
  * All existing heat pump water heaters being replaced must be 10 years old or older. 
  * You must purchase a new [qualifying ENERGY STAR® certified hybrid/heat pump water heater](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-water-heaters/ "qualifying ENERGY STAR® hybrid/heat pump water heater"). 
  * You must submit your application within 90 days of purchase. Applications submitted after this timeframe will not be approved. 
  * You must adhere to all applicable permitting requirements.* 


###  Requirements 
  * The heat pump water heater you purchase must: 
    * Be labeled an ENERGY STAR® hybrid electric water heater, also referred to as a heat pump water heater, and have an Energy Factor of 2.0 or better 
    * Store a minimum of 40 gallons of water 
    * Be installed new (not used) 
    * Be installed meeting all applicable codes and adhering to all applicable building permit processes for proper installation 
    * Be permanently installed at the structure 
    * Have minimum required clearances and free area as determined by  
the manufacturer 
    * Carry a minimum six-year warranty on major components supplied  
by manufacturer 
  * If required, you must agree to a post-installation inspection by Austin Energy. 


###  Permitting Information 
*It is the customer's responsibility to meet all permitting and building code requirements for their Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ). Use the following resources to help you research permitting requirements for your AHJ: 
  * [City of Austin Permitting Requirement for Property Owners and Occupants (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AEP-Permit-Process.pdf?rev=ea6dd3b8397849dd86c81560fcae33a2&hash=288243311BFA9FD311F9BBDCA92806D9)
  * [City of Austin Development Services Department Permits](https://www.austintexas.gov/development-services/types-permits "City of Austin Development Services Department Permits")
  * [City of Bee Cave Building Permitting & Inspections](https://www.beecavetexas.gov/cms/one.aspx?pageId=18735126 "City of Bee Cave Building Permitting and Inspections")
  * [City of Manor Building Permits](https://tx-manor.civicplus.com/183/Building-Permit-FAQs)
  * [Lakeway Building & Development Services](https://www.lakeway-tx.gov/67/Building-Development "Lakeway Building & Development Services")
  * [Rollingwood Residential Planning and Development](https://www.rollingwoodtx.gov/planning-development "Rollingwood Residential Planning and Development")
  * [Sunset Valley Permits FAQs](https://www.sunsetvalley.org/departments/planning-development/building-and-sign-permits/permit-faq "Sunset Valley Permits FAQs")


If you do not see your AHJ listed or are unsure which AHJ you are located in, please contact your City for assistance. Contact information for cities and villages located in Travis County may be found at the [Travis County website](https://www.traviscountytx.gov/tnr/links "Travis County, Texas website"). If you live in Williamson County, please contact the Williamson County Courthouse for assistance finding your City’s information at the [Williamson County website](https://www.wilco.org/Residents/ContactUs "Williamson County, Texas website"). 
###  Rebate Recipient Eligibility Requirements 
  * Property owners or electric account holders that purchased and installed the equipment are eligible to receive the rebates. 
  * By default, the rebate payment is directed to the customer listed on the Austin Energy electric account. The rebate may also be directed to one of the below parties if all requirements are met. 
    * The property owner, verified using county tax records. 
    * A tenant at the property, when the property owner submits a signed Letter of Authorization to issue the rebate to the tenant. 
    * A property manager, when the property owner submits a signed Letter of Authorization to issue the rebate to the property manager. 
    * If you need a Letter of Authorization, please email the Austin Energy Appliance Efficiency Program. 
  * Customers, contractors, builders and developers may submit applications online. An account number will be required for all submissions. 
  * Installation of gas water heaters are not eligible for this rebate. 


###  Apply for Your Rebate Online 
You must submit your rebate application online within 90 days of purchase. Applications submitted after this timeframe will not be approved. The following information is required for your online rebate application: 
  * Active Austin Energy Electric Account Number 
  * Tax Assessor Property ID
  * Installation Address
  * Permit number (if required) 
  * Manufacturer 
  * Model 
  * Serial number 
  * Energy factor 
  * Size (gallons) 
  * Location (conditioned or unconditioned space) 
  * If applicable, old unit fuel types (gas, electric resistance, heat pump, propane) 
  * Receipt 
  * Letter of Authorization (if applicable – see _Eligibility_ for details) 


#### Apply for a Rebate Online
You can apply for your rebate online once you purchase and install a heat pump water heater.
[Apply Online](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#enrollment/?programId=4&cm_sp=EEC-AEP-_-Application-_-null)
#### Check Your Rebate Status
Use the confirmation (enrollment) and utility account numbers to check the status of your rebate application.
[Check Status](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#status/statuscheck?programId=4)
####  Tips for Applying Online 
  * Before you submit the application, you will need to have all required information on hand. 
  * If your application requires supporting documentation, such as invoices or sales receipts, you will need to scan or photograph these documents and upload into the application system. The system will accept any of the following file formats: 
    * Adobe Acrobat PDF (.pdf) 
    * Microsoft Word Document (.doc or .docx) 
    * JPEG (.jpg) 
    * ZIP (.zip) 
  * Check your rebate status online using the confirmation (enrollment) number you receive after the application submission. You will also need your City of Austin utility account number. 


Please email the Austin Energy Appliance Efficiency Program if you have questions about your rebate status or need help with your rebate application. 
#### Disclaimer
Funding is limited and available only to Austin Energy customers on a first-come, first-served basis. Offerings are subject to change without notice. Rebates are not guaranteed until after Austin Energy's review and approval of the rebate application. Program guidelines include additional requirements and limitations for receiving the above rebates. Contact us for more details.

If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Save Money &amp;amp; Energy](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/saveMoneyIcon.png?rev=2b1b281496e04fe7a0a742e47063c371&w=100&hash=67157C959E7182DF29B2FC48F4EBC8D4)
Save Money & Energy
Saving energy and money go hand-in-hand. We can all contribute to reducing Austin’s energy demand by making simple lifestyle changes and energy-efficient home improvements. When demand decreases, we all save. Austin Energy is committed to helping our customers achieve the greatest savings possible.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ac "Save Money & Energy")
![Air Conditioning](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-HP-Air-Conditioner.jpg?rev=67328b974378430d88153da173974656&w=780&hash=70ED0F48A76152DAB1FE9CB4AFC285AE)
Earn a rebate averaging $800 to install a new, energy efficient air conditioning system.
  * Description
  * Incentive
  * Eligibility
  * How to Apply
  * Find a Contractor


Save energy and money with an energy-efficient air conditioner or heat pump. Austin Energy offers a rebate averaging $800 when a participating contractor installs a qualifying system in your home. 
###  Additional Rebates Available When You Upgrade to Home Energy Savings
Maximize your investment in a new air conditioner and earn additional rebates when you participate in Home Energy Savings, a whole-home approach to energy efficiency. 
If you proceed with air conditioner-only rebates, you can still qualify for other rebates and financing options through Home Energy Savings. If you choose to participate in Home Energy Savings within six months after receiving your air conditioner rebate, you could be eligible for an additional $200 rebate.
[Learn more about the benefits Home Energy Savings](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/maximize-your-energy-savings/save-energy-increase-comfort).
###  Other Energy Efficiency Incentives 
Austin Energy also offers rebates for the following equipment that can improve your home’s energy efficiency: 
  * [Window Air Conditioners](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/window-ac "Window Air Conditioner Rebate")
  * [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heater Rebate")
  * [Pool Pumps](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pool-pump "Pool Pump Rebate")
  * [Power Partner Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat)
  * [Solar Screens](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/solar-screens)


Rebate amounts vary based on the type of equipment you install. 
Central Split AC & Mini-Split AC Systems*  
---  
Tier  |  SEER2** |  EER2*** | Rebates   
1  |  15.2 |  12.0 | $600   
2  |  17.0  |  12.0  | $700   
3  |  18.0  |  13.0  | $800  
Heat Pump & Heat Pump Mini-Split Systems*‡  
---  
Tier  |  SEER2** |  EER2*** | HSPF2**** | Rebates   
1  |  15.2 | 11.0 | 7.8 | $650   
2  |  16.0  |  11.0  | 8.0 | $750   
3  |  17.0  |  13.0  | 9.0 | $950  
* **Federal Tax Credit** information, eligibility criteria, and how to apply is available on the IRS website at <https://www.irs.gov/credits-deductions/energy-efficient-home-improvement-credit>. IRS eligibility criteria for tax credits may exceed Austin Energy’s rebate eligibility criteria. Austin Energy recommends customers and contractors refer to the IRS guidelines for tax credit eligibility.
** **Seasonal Energy Efficiency Ratio 2 (SEER2)** measures average energy efficiency over a cooling season.
*** **Energy Efficiency Ratio 2 (EER2)** measures an air conditioner's energy efficiency at high outdoor temperatures and persistent use.
**** **Heating Seasonal Performance Factor 2 (HSPF2)** measures the efficiency of a heat pump over the fall and winter seasons.
**‡ Consortium for Energy Efficiency (CEE) 2025 Requirements:** Effective January 1, 2025, additional specifications for air source heat pumps are outlined in the [CEE℠ Residential Heating and Cooling Systems Initiative Electric Equipment Specifications](https://cee1.my.site.com/s/resources?id=a0V2R00000sUQby) document. Please refer to the CEE specifications for details on the 2025 requirements. 
###  Prerequisites 
  * You must receive electricity from Austin Energy. 
  * You must use an Austin Energy participating contractor. 
  * All existing systems being replaced must be 10 years old or older. 
  * Rebates are available only for the replacement of existing equipment. 
  * New equipment is not eligible for rebates if the existing equipment received rebates within the last 10 years. 
  * Your home must be 10 years old or older. 
  * Your participating contractor must submit your rebate application within 90 days of installation. Applications submitted after this time-frame will not be approved. 


Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. All participating contractors must abide by the [Austin Energy Code of Conduct and Ethical Requirements (pdf)​](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyCodeConduct-v2esign.pdf?rev=f218a19f977841de9b02c9435aa63e16&sc_lang=en&hash=2CCBAF0C6FB8E06AF11F75A6CB8345F9). 
###  Requirements 
  * All installations must reduce peak demand for electricity. 
  * All required City of Austin permits must be in place. Refer to [Permitting Requirement for Property Owners and Occupants (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AEP-Permit-Process.pdf?rev=ea6dd3b8397849dd86c81560fcae33a2&sc_lang=en&hash=CEC71533269FE38BEB51EC3E0A75E086) for details. 
  * All work must meet manufacturers’ standards and local, state, and national codes. 
  * Your new air conditioner must meet the efficiency guidelines in the rebate tables. 
  * All components of the system (condenser, furnace/air handler, and evaporative coil) must be replaced to qualify for rebates. 
  * Your installer must size equipment to an approved ACCA Manual J methodology or [Austin Energy's Air Conditioning Sizing Guidance (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyAirConditioningSizingGuidance.pdf?rev=e80fc0f9e6954a9bb055932454093991&sc_lang=en&hash=90D7C7F1F76E106F49B5B1E4AD4FE2B4 "Austin Energy Residential Air Conditioning Sizing Guide"). 
  * You must attach proof that your equipment meets the sizing requirement (Manual J or [Austin Energy's Air Conditioning Sizing Guidance (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyAirConditioningSizingGuidance.pdf?rev=e80fc0f9e6954a9bb055932454093991&sc_lang=en&hash=90D7C7F1F76E106F49B5B1E4AD4FE2B4 "Austin Energy Residential Air Conditioning Sizing Guide"). 
  * You must agree to a post-installation inspection by Austin Energy. 


###  Exclusions 
  * Air conditioning systems with electric resistance heating elements do not qualify. 


###  Rebate Recipient Eligibility Requirements 
  * Property owners or electric account holders that purchased and installed the equipment are eligible to receive the rebates. 
  * By default, the rebate payment is directed to the customer listed on the Austin Energy electric account. The rebate may also be directed to one of the below parties if all requirements are met. 
    * The property owner, verified using county tax records. 
    * A tenant at the property, when the property owner submits a signed Letter of Authorization to issue the rebate to the tenant. 
    * A property manager, when the property owner submits a signed Letter of Authorization to issue the rebate to the property manager. 
    * If you need a Letter of Authorization, please email the Austin Energy Appliance Efficiency Program. 
  * Participating contractors are not eligible to receive the air conditioner rebates. 


###  Find a Participating Contractor 
You must have a participating contractor install the equipment to qualify for this offering. Austin Energy recommends that you get at least three different estimates from any of the contractors listed on this page. 
Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. All participating contractors must abide by the [Austin Energy Code of Conduct and Ethical Requirements (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyCodeConduct-v2esign.pdf?rev=f218a19f977841de9b02c9435aa63e16&sc_lang=en&hash=2CCBAF0C6FB8E06AF11F75A6CB8345F9). 
#### Check Your Rebate Status
Use the confirmation (enrollment) and utility account numbers to check the status of your rebate application.
[Check Status](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#status/statuscheck?programId=4)
The participating contractor will apply for your rebate on your behalf through Austin Energy’s online rebate processing system. Your participating contractor will need the following information for your rebate application: 
**Air Conditioner**
  * Active Austin Energy Customer Account Number 
  * Tax Assessor Property ID 
  * AHRI Reference Number and AHRI Certificate of Certified Product Performance 
  * Square footage of conditioned space for new unit(s) 
  * Old unit age (must be 10 years old or older to qualify) 
  * Old unit tons 
  * Total number of air conditioner units at the address 
  * New system type (split, split-inverter, or mini-split) 
  * New unit condensing serial number 
  * New condensing tier 
  * Invoice that must include: 
    * Unit model numbers 
    * Unit serial numbers 
    * Installation date 
    * Rebate recipient/applicant contact information (name, address, email address and/or phone number) 
    * Installation address 
  * Letter of Authorization (if applicable – see the _Eligibility_ tab) 


**Heat Pump**
  * Active Austin Energy Customer Account Number 
  * Tax Assessor Property ID 
  * AHRI Reference Number and AHRI Certificate of Certified Product Performance 
  * Square footage of conditioned space for new unit(s) 
  * Old unit age (must be 10 years or older) 
  * Old unit tons 
  * Old unit fuel type (gas, electric resistance, heat pump, propane) 
  * Total number of air conditioner units at the address 
  * New system type (split, split-inverter, or mini-split) 
  * New unit condensing serial number 
  * Invoice that must include: 
    * Unit model numbers 
    * Unit serial numbers 
    * Installation date 
    * Rebate recipient/applicant contact information (name, address, email address and/or phone number) 
    * Installation address 
  * Letter of Authorization (if applicable – see _Eligibility_ for details) 


### Find a Participating Contractor
You must have a participating contractor install the equipment to qualify for this offering. Austin Energy recommends that you get at least three different estimates from any of the contractors listed on this page.
Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. All participating contractors must abide by the [Austin Energy Code of Conduct and Ethical Requirements (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyCodeConduct-v2esign.pdf?rev=f218a19f977841de9b02c9435aa63e16&sc_lang=en&hash=2CCBAF0C6FB8E06AF11F75A6CB8345F9).

##### About Our Translations

As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Save Money &amp;amp; Energy](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/saveMoneyIcon.png?rev=2b1b281496e04fe7a0a742e47063c371&w=100&hash=67157C959E7182DF29B2FC48F4EBC8D4)
Save Money & Energy
Saving energy and money go hand-in-hand. We can all contribute to reducing Austin’s energy demand by making simple lifestyle changes and energy-efficient home improvements. When demand decreases, we all save. Austin Energy is committed to helping our customers achieve the greatest savings possible.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pool-pump "Save Money & Energy")
![Pool Pump](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-Pool-Pump.jpg?rev=36649f7165f44989a3965a12be7f56fe&w=780&hash=BB1AFD8F930CECEA0BA15A32B69646CC)
Earn a $300 rebate on qualifying ENERGY STAR® variable-speed pool pumps. 
  * Description
  * Incentive
  * Eligibility
  * How to Apply
  * Find a Contractor


A variable-speed pool pump uses less energy to keep your pool clean. Austin Energy offers a $300 rebate when you work with a participating contractor to install a new, [qualifying ENERGY STAR® variable speed pool pump](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-pool-pumps/%20 "qualifying ENERGY STAR® variable speed pool pump for your home"). 
A variable speed pool pump provides: 
  * 65% less energy use
  * Ten years of reliable operation 
  * Quieter and more efficient cleaning 
  * Reduced maintenance 
  * Return on investment within two to three years 
  * A $300 rebate from Austin Energy 


Interested in learning more? Visit [ENERGY STAR](https://www.energystar.gov/products/pool_pumps "ENERGY STAR Pool Pumps") for details on variable speed pool pumps. 
###  Participating Contractor Required for Rebate 
To qualify for this rebate, Austin Energy requires that you use a participating contractor to install the variable speed pool pump. Your participating contractor can help you choose the right equipment for your home. 
###  Other Energy Efficiency Incentives 
Austin Energy also offers rebates for the following equipment that can improve energy efficiency in your home: 
  * [Air Conditioning](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ac "Air Conditioning")
  * [Window Air Conditioners](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/window-ac "Window Air Conditioners")
  * [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heaters")
  * [Power PartnerSM Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat)
  * [Solar Screens](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/solar-screens)


Austin Energy offers a $300 rebate per unit to customers who install a qualified variable-speed pool pump. 
To find qualifying variable speed pool pumps, visit the [ENERGY STAR Find and Compare Products webpage](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-pool-pumps/results "ENERGY STAR Find and Compare Products") and search for variable speed pool pumps. 
Participating contractors can provide more information. 
###  Prerequisites 
  * You must receive electricity from Austin Energy. 
  * You must purchase a new [qualifying ENERGY STAR variable speed pool pump](https://www.energystar.gov/products/pool_pumps "qualifying ENERGY STAR® variable speed pool pump for your home").
  * You must use an Austin Energy participating contractor to install the variable speed pool pump. 
  * Your participating contractor must submit your application within 90 days of installation. Applications submitted after this timeframe will not be approved. 


Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. All participating contractors must abide by the [Austin Energy Code of Conduct and Ethical Requirements (pdf)​](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyCodeConduct-v2esign.pdf?rev=f218a19f977841de9b02c9435aa63e16&sc_lang=en&hash=2CCBAF0C6FB8E06AF11F75A6CB8345F9). 
###  Requirements 
  * All installations must reduce peak demand for electricity. 
  * All work must meet manufacturers’ standards and local, state, and national codes. 
  * The new pool pump must replace an existing pump or be installed in a new, in-ground pool. 
  * The new pool pump must be installed at your address. 


###  Exclusions 
  * New in-ground pools and existing pools with solar heating are not eligible. 


###  Rebate Recipient Eligibility Requirements 
  * Property owners or electric account holders that purchased and installed the equipment are eligible to receive the rebates. 
  * By default, the rebate payment is directed to the customer listed on the Austin Energy electric account. The rebate may also be directed to one of the below parties if all requirements are met. 
    * The property owner, verified using county tax records. 
    * A tenant at the property, when the property owner submits a signed Letter of Authorization to issue the rebate to the tenant. 
    * A property manager, when the property owner submits a signed Letter of Authorization to issue the rebate to the property manager. 
    * If you need a Letter of Authorization, please email the Austin Energy Appliance Efficiency Program. 
  * Participating contractors are not eligible to receive the rebates. 


###  Find a Participating Contractor 
You must have a participating contractor install the equipment to qualify for this offering. Austin Energy recommends that you get at least three different estimates from any of the contractors listed on this page. 
Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. All participating contractors must abide by the [Austin Energy Code of Conduct and Ethical Requirements (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyCodeConduct-v2esign.pdf?rev=f218a19f977841de9b02c9435aa63e16&sc_lang=en&hash=2CCBAF0C6FB8E06AF11F75A6CB8345F9). 
#### Check Your Rebate Status
Use the confirmation (enrollment) and utility account numbers to check the status of your rebate application.
[Check Status](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#status/statuscheck?programId=4)
The participating contractor will apply for your rebate on your behalf through Austin Energy’s online rebate processing system. Your participating contractor will need the following information for your rebate application: 
  * Active Austin Energy Customer Account Number 
  * Tax Assessor Property ID 
  * Heating type (electric, gas, none) 
  * Pool size (gallons) 
  * Rated horsepower 
  * Maximum service factor for new pool pump 
  * Manufacturer 
  * Model 
  * Serial Number 
  * Variable Speed (Yes or No) 
  * Invoice that must include: 
    * Unit model numbers 
    * Unit serial numbers 
    * Installation date 
    * Rebate recipient/applicant contact information (name, address, email address and/or phone number) 
    * Installation address 
  * Letter of Authorization (if applicable – see _Eligibility_ for details) 


### Find a Participating Contractor
You must have a participating contractor install the equipment to qualify for this offering. Austin Energy recommends that you get at least three different estimates from any of the contractors listed on this page.
Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. ##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
