### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Save Money &amp;amp; Energy](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/saveMoneyIcon.png?rev=2b1b281496e04fe7a0a742e47063c371&w=100&hash=67157C959E7182DF29B2FC48F4EBC8D4)
Save Money & Energy
Saving energy and money go hand-in-hand. We can all contribute to reducing Austin’s energy demand by making simple lifestyle changes and energy-efficient home improvements. When demand decreases, we all save. Austin Energy is committed to helping our customers achieve the greatest savings possible.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat "Save Money & Energy")
![ Power Partner℠ Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-PPT-Offering.jpg?rev=98d9dbdbd30f4a4baaefaef74b496873&w=780&hash=EA3C8471D01A7FF8CB3D1B83D9452F70)
Earn rewards and help keep energy affordable for everyone. When you become a Power Partner, you join thousands who reduce their energy use when the demand for energy peaks.
Power Partners earn $75 upfront plus $30 annually for each eligible thermostat enrolled in the program.
  * Description
  * Incentive
  * Eligibility
  * How to Apply


## Increased Incentive for Residential Customers 
Save up to $155 when you enroll in Power Partner and purchase a new eligible smart thermostat. 
Become a Power Partner:  
**Earn $75** when you enroll your eligible thermostat in Power Partner  
**Plus, receive $30 every year** for each eligible thermostat you keep enrolled 
Save on your purchase:   
**Enjoy a $50 rebate*** on a new eligible smart thermostat. 
*Thermostat rebate increased from $30 to $50 as of November 24, 2025.
###  Become a Power Partner
Power Partners help the community manage energy use on days when the demand is highest. During these times, Austin Energy briefly adjusts enrolled smart thermostats to use less energy.
As a Power Partner, you can:
  * Earn rewards for each smart thermostat you enroll
  * Help lower the cost of electricity in our community
  * Enhance power grid reliability during periods of peak energy demand
  * Reduce your carbon footprint


[Learn more about Power Partner Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/learn/monitor-your-usage/smart-energy-savings)
### Enjoy Two Ways to Save:
#### **Thinking of Buying a Smart Thermostat?**
Austin Energy offers a **$50 rebate** when you buy and install a new eligible smart thermostat. Read the _Incentive_ tab for details.
#### **Already Have a Smart Thermostat?**
Get a **$75 bill credit** for each eligible thermostat enrolled in Power Partner, plus $30 annually for each thermostat that remains enrolled.  
  
Customers will typically receive their annual incentives within 1 to 2 billing cycles of their enrollment anniversary date, subject to additional delays due to the volume of total program payouts in a given month. For example, if you enrolled your thermostat in June, you would receive your annual $30 incentive between July and August of the following year.
### Power Partner Events
Power Partner events occur on days of high community energy use or when there is an emergency. On these days, Austin Energy will initiate Power Partner events that briefly adjust your thermostat settings by up to 4 degrees. These remote adjustments help manage energy use throughout the community.
Most Power Partner events will:
  * Typically occur for two hours between 3:00 and 6:00 p.m. during the summer (June 1 through Sept. 30). Austin Energy may conduct events outside of these windows, between 6:00 a.m. and 10:00 p.m., and for longer durations, including but not limited to winter and year-round extreme weather circumstances. Austin Energy may also periodically conduct tests throughout the year, usually lasting no longer than one hour. Like typical energy conservation events, customers can easily opt out of these using their device or app. 
  * Adjust your thermostat by up to 4 degrees, which may include pre-cooling or pre-heating prior to an event to help prolong your initial comfort level. Pre-cooling and pre-heating adjust your existing thermostat setting by 2 degrees, up to 30 minutes beforehand.
  * Occur on non-holiday weekdays. During extreme weather circumstances, Austin Energy may conduct events on holidays and weekends.
  * Occur no more than three times per week and no more than 25 times during the year. During extreme weather circumstances, Austin Energy may conduct events up to five times per week.


You can override Power Partner events at any time by simply adjusting the temperature on your thermostat or thermostat app. Customers who wish to permanently end their participation in Power Partner events may submit a [Power Partner Opt Out request](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/ppt_opt_out).
Austin Energy does not send Power Partner event notifications, which are set by the thermostat manufacturer. Manufacturers may or may not provide notifications prior to a Power Partner event. Notifications will usually appear in two ways: 1) on the smart thermostat screen or 2) within the manufacturer’s smart thermostat app on a mobile device, instead of as a text message or email. 
_Note: We do**not** recommend participating in this offering if someone in your facility is experiencing serious health problems._
### Eligibility and Enrollment
To enroll as a Power Partner and qualify for**bill credits** , find your eligible thermostat manufacturer and model in the _Eligibility_ tab and click the _How to Enroll_ link. You may also be eligible for a separate $50 rebate* on a smart thermostat when you apply within 90 days of purchase.
*Thermostat rebate increase of $50 took effect on 11/24/25. If your thermostat was purchased before 11/24/25, you are eligible for the previous rebate of $30.
Austin Energy will provide: 
  * A $75 bill credit for each eligible thermostat you enroll in Power Partner (see _Eligibility_ tab for more details). The credit will appear as an “Adjustment” line item within 1-2 billing cycles after approval. Seasonal offer ends January 31, 2026.
  * An additional $30 annual bill credit for each eligible thermostat that remains enrolled in Power Partner. 
    * Customers will typically receive their annual incentives within 1 to 2 billing cycles of their enrollment anniversary date, subject to additional delays due to the volume of total program payouts in a given month. For example, if you enrolled your thermostat in June, you would receive your annual $30 incentive between July and August of the following year.
  * A $50 rebate for Austin Energy customers who buy and install eligible thermostats. Thermostats are eligible for a rebate within 90 days of purchase. [Apply online](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#enrollment/?programId=4&cm_sp=EEC-AEP-_-Application-_-null)


**Prerequisites**
  * You must have an [eligible thermostat](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat#eligibletable). 
  * You must be an Austin Energy customer with a unique account number. Co-op and master-metered accounts are not eligible at this time. 
  * Simply replacing an already enrolled smart thermostat with a new smart thermostat in the same household is not eligible for an additional incentive. 


**Requirements**
  * You must agree to a post-installation inspection by Austin Energy, if necessary. 
  * Existing equipment must be connected and operational. 
  * You must have a standard air conditioning system (split system, package unit, or heat pump). 
  * The heater component may be gas or electric. 
  * Your air conditioning equipment must be in good mechanical condition and controlled by an approved, communicating thermostat device. 
  * Homeowners and renters are eligible to receive the Power Partner participation bill credit. Homeowners and renters may also receive the purchase and installation rebate if they purchased and installed the thermostat. 
  * Landlords are only eligible for the purchase and installation rebate and are **not** eligible to receive the Power Partner bill credit. 
  * Applicants are limited to five (5) thermostats. 
  * You must use an eligible thermostat from the list below. 


####  Eligible Thermostats
Vendor  |  Thermostat Models  |  How to Enroll   
---|---|---  
**Alarm.com** †  |  Trane ComfortLink Control; RCS Z-Wave Communicating Thermostat; GoControl Z-wave Thermostat; Alarm.com Smart Thermostat  |  [Enroll with Alarm.com](https://greatergrid.com/enroll/programs/thermostats/austin-energy)  
**Amazon** |  Smart Thermostat  |  [Enroll with Amazon](https://greatergrid.com/enroll/programs/thermostats/austin-energy)  
**ecobee** |  ecobee, ecobee 3, ecobee 7, ecobee 3 lite, ecobee 4, ecobee 5, ecobee Smart Si, ecobee SmartThermostat with Voice Control, ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium, ecobee Smart Thermostat Enhanced, ecobee Smart Thermostat Essential |  [Enroll with ecobee](https://greatergrid.com/enroll/programs/thermostats/austin-energy)[ ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Ecobee_Power_Partner_Enrollment.pdf?rev=e6a43ccb2d064069b6958c1efb939c69&sc_lang=en&hash=F0A44616DF0068B4DBB1C7E6E0CECF97)  
**Emerson** |  Sensi™ Wi-Fi Programmable Thermostat, Sensi Touch Wi-Fi Thermostat  |  [Enroll with Emerson](https://greatergrid.com/enroll/programs/thermostats/austin-energy)  
**Honeywell Home** |  Wi-Fi Smart Color Thermostat, Wi-Fi 7-Day Programmable Thermostat, Wi-Fi 9000 7-Day Programmable Thermostat, 9000 Smart Thermostat, 7-Day Programmable Smart Thermostat, VisionPro 8000 Smart Thermostat, Round Smart Thermostat, T5+ Smart Thermostat, T6 Pro Smart Thermostat, T9 Smart Thermostat, T10 Smart Thermostat  |  [Enroll with Honeywell Home](https://greatergrid.com/enroll/programs/thermostats/austin-energy)  
**Lux Products** |  LUX/GEO, LUX KONO  |  [Enroll with Lux](https://enroll.luxproducts.com/?_ga=2.85286426.28585237.1611258655-1104003706.1599578140 "Lux products")  
**Nest** |  Nest Thermostat, Nest Learning Thermostat (3rd and 4th generation), Nest Thermostat E  |  [Enroll with Nest](https://nest.com/energy-partners/austin-energy/ "Enroll with Nest")  
† _Select thermostats must be installed by a third-party installer as part of an alarm system package._
_Some thermostat manufacturers may conduct their own energy savings programs. Refer to your thermostat manufacturer's website for details._
Register your eligible device with the manufacturer. 
###  How to Receive Your Bill Credits
  1. Connect your thermostat to a Wi-Fi network or a networked hub in your home or business. Create your thermostat account with your thermostat manufacturer using your computer or smartphone. 
  2. Click on the enrollment instructions for your specific device make and model, listed on the _Description_ tab. 
  3. Follow the instructions in the email you receive from the thermostat manufacturer to complete your application. 
  4. If approved, you will receive confirmation by email from the thermostat manufacturer. If approved, you should receive your bill credit within 1-2 billing cycles of enrolling. 


###  How to Apply for Your $50 Rebate 
A separate $50 rebate* is available to Austin Energy customers who buy and install a new eligible smart thermostat. Thermostats are eligible for a rebate within 90 days of purchase. [Apply online](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#enrollment/?programId=4&cm_sp=EEC-AEP-_-Application-_-null)
*Thermostat rebate increase of $50 took effect on 11/24/25. If your thermostat was purchased before 11/24/25, you are eligible for the previous rebate of $30. 
###  Tips for Applying Online 
  * If you choose to submit the online rebate application, you will need to have all required information on hand before you start. 
  * You will need to complete and submit the application in a single session. You cannot save your information and start again later. Active sessions time out after one hour of inactivity. 


#### Apply for a $50 Rebate Online
You can apply for your $50 rebate online once you purchase your new eligible thermostat.
[Apply Online](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#?programId=4&cm_sp=EEC-AEP-_-Application-_-null)
#### Are You Waiting For a Rebate?
Use the confirmation (enrollment) and utility account numbers to check the status of your rebate application.
[Check Status](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#status/statuscheck?programId=4&cm_sp=EEC-AEP-_-Status-_-null)
#### Disclaimer
Funding is limited and available only to Austin Energy customers on a first-come, first-served basis. Offerings are subject to change without notice. Rebates are not guaranteed until after Austin Energy's review and approval of the rebate application. Program guidelines include additional requirements and limitations for receiving the above rebates. Contact us for more details.

# Solar Screens
## Rebates & Incentives

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Save Money &amp;amp; Energy](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/saveMoneyIcon.png?rev=2b1b281496e04fe7a0a742e47063c371&w=100&hash=67157C959E7182DF29B2FC48F4EBC8D4)
Save Money & Energy
Saving energy and money go hand-in-hand. We can all contribute to reducing Austin’s energy demand by making simple lifestyle changes and energy-efficient home improvements. When demand decreases, we all save. Austin Energy is committed to helping our customers achieve the greatest savings possible.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/solar-screens "Save Money & Energy")
![Solar Screens](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-Solar-Screens.jpg?rev=4c47a2ed4aca4271995c5d53ab6d1301&w=780&hash=5FE757B2A226A89C93D65F9B4B61C0AF)
Earn a rebate to install energy-saving solar screens on your home’s windows. 
  * Description
  * Incentive
  * Eligibility
  * How to Apply
  * Find a Contractor


Windows can let in large amounts of heat from the sun, also known as heat gain. Solar screens reduce heat gain, UV damage, and glare while still providing natural light inside your home. Austin Energy offers a rebate of $1 per square foot for eligible installed solar screen fabric. 
Solar screens provide the following benefits: 
  * Block up to 70% of the sun’s heat 
  * Reduce damaging UV rays 
  * Dramatically reduce heat gain 
  * Reduce household temperature by 10-15 degrees during warmer months 
  * Lower cooling bills 
  * Increase daytime privacy 
  * Protect against fading of furniture, draperies, rugs, and carpet


The rebate for solar screens is $1.00 per square foot for eligible solar screen fabric. 
Eligible solar screen fabric must have a heat gain coefficient (SHGC) of 0.40 or lower. 
###  Prerequisites 
  * Your home must receive electric service from Austin Energy at a residential rate. 
  * Rebates are available for new construction and/or existing residential property. 
  * By default, the rebate payment is directed to the customer listed on the Austin Energy electric account. 
  * Builders of new construction are not eligible for rebate. 
  * Solar screen replacements are not eligible if they received a rebate through an Austin Energy rebate program less than 10 years prior. 
  * Only owners of single-family homes, condominiums, town homes, duplexes, triplexes, fourplexes, and rental properties are eligible. 
  * Your residence cannot be a mobile or manufactured home. 
  * Your participating contractor must submit your rebate application within 90 days of installation. Applications submitted beyond this time frame will not be approved. 
  * Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. All participating contractors must abide by the [Austin Energy Code of Conduct and Ethical Requirements (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyCodeConduct-v2esign.pdf?rev=f218a19f977841de9b02c9435aa63e16&sc_lang=en&hash=2CCBAF0C6FB8E06AF11F75A6CB8345F9)​. 


###  Requirements 
  * All installations must reduce peak demand for electricity. 
  * Deteriorated solar screens may be replaced with new solar screens. 
  * Manufacturer product information with the rated solar heat gain coefficient (SHGC) and warranty statement must be attached/submitted. 
  * Solar screen fabric/material must have a heat gain coefficient (SHGC) 0.40 or lower to qualify. 
  * An aluminum frame with approved listed material is required: 
    * Frame component dimensions (depth/thickness, width and gauge): 3/8” x 3/4” and 0.020 gauge 
    * If window screen mounting will not accept 3/8” frame, use 5/16” x 3/4” with 0.020 gauge 
    * Center bar dimensions of 5/16” or 3/8” x 5/8” with 0.020 gauge 
    * All screen corners must be mitered and use metal, NO plastic corner braces. 
  * Screen material must be stretched squarely and tightly, so it deflects no more than ¼” when gently depressed. 
  * Must fit snugly and evenly in or on the window. 
  * Solar screens must be installed and mounted with correct hardware. 
  * Screens must have more than half an hour of direct sunlight on over half the window to qualify for rebates. 
  * All solar shading shall be installed according to all applicable building codes and manufacturer installation guidelines 
  * Austin Energy reserves the right to deny or adjust all rebate applications. 
  * Austin Energy reserves the right to perform an inspection of the installation. 


###  Rebate Recipient Eligibility Requirements 
  * Property owners or electric account holders purchasing and installing the equipment are eligible to receive the rebates. 
  * By default, the rebate payment is directed to the customer listed on the Austin Energy electric account. The rebate may also be directed to one of the below parties if all requirements are met. 
    * The property owner, to be verified using county tax records. 
    * A tenant at the property, when the property owner submits a signed [Letter of Authorization (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergy-AEP-LOA.pdf?rev=1c33503503db424b93fa9ce908a951a7&sc_lang=en&hash=E7EED9E4A952650708A126C2D34CEA64) to issue the rebate to the tenant. 
    * A property manager, when the property owner submits a signed Letter of Authorization to issue the rebate to the property manager. 
  * Participating contractors are not eligible to receive solar screen rebates. 


###  Find a Participating Contractor 
You must use a participating contractor to install the equipment to qualify for this offering. 
The participating contractor will apply for the rebate on your behalf through Austin Energy’s online rebate processing system. Your participating contractor will need the following information for your rebate application: 
  * Active Austin Energy Customer Account Number 


#### Check Your Rebate Status
Use the confirmation (enrollment) and utility account numbers to check the status of your rebate application.
[Check Status](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#status/statuscheck?programId=4)
  * Invoice that must include: 
    * Installation date 
    * Installation address 
    * Rebate recipient/applicant contact information (name, address, email address and/or phone number) 
  * A signed [Letter of Authorization (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergy-AEP-LOA.pdf?rev=1c33503503db424b93fa9ce908a951a7&sc_lang=en&hash=E7EED9E4A952650708A126C2D34CEA64) (if applicable – see _Eligibility_ for details) 


### Find a Participating Contractor
You must have a participating contractor install the equipment to qualify for this offering. Austin Energy recommends that you get at least three different estimates from any of the contractors listed on this page.
Participating contractors must comply with all program requirements and conduct business in an honest, professional, and ethical manner. All participating contractors must abide by the [Austin Energy Code of Conduct and Ethical Requirements (pdf)](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/AustinEnergyCodeConduct-v2esign.pdf?rev=f218a19f977841de9b02c9435aa63e16&sc_lang=en&hash=2CCBAF0C6FB8E06AF11F75A6CB8345F9).

####  ![DocumentIcon](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/documentIconNew.png?rev=ce37e3189dcf4202829a7f960eb90cbd&hash=DB741C1488BE4A02EB12ABE83D5C1CC1) Additional Documents

#### Disclaimer
Funding is limited and available only to Austin Energy customers on a first-come, first-served basis. Offerings are subject to change without notice. Rebates are not guaranteed until after Austin Energy's review and approval of the rebate application. Program guidelines include additional requirements and limitations for receiving the above rebates. Contact us for more details.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Save Money &amp;amp; Energy](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Temp/saveMoneyIcon.png?rev=2b1b281496e04fe7a0a742e47063c371&w=100&hash=67157C959E7182DF29B2FC48F4EBC8D4)
Save Money & Energy
Saving energy and money go hand-in-hand. We can all contribute to reducing Austin’s energy demand by making simple lifestyle changes and energy-efficient home improvements. When demand decreases, we all save. Austin Energy is committed to helping our customers achieve the greatest savings possible.
[ Learn More ](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/window-ac "Save Money & Energy")
![Window Air Conditioners](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Offerings/Res-Window-Unit-AC.jpg?rev=086c2d3ea04a48338fb1d4942dcccab2&w=780&hash=8766CF4A028B9386B18F0531702E3839)
Receive a $50 rebate from Austin Energy to buy a new ENERGY STAR® qualified window air conditioner.
  * Description
  * Incentive
  * Eligibility
  * How to Apply


Austin Energy offers a $50 rebate when you buy a new, [qualifying ENERGY STAR window air conditioner](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-room-air-conditioners/results "qualifying ENERGY STAR window air conditioner"). ENERGY STAR window air conditioners use up to 15% less energy than conventional models. Timers on the unit let you adjust temperature settings for comfort and savings.
Be sure you choose the right size based on the size of your room. A unit that is too large for your room can make your air-conditioned space damp and uncomfortable. The benefits of getting the right-sized unit include: 
  * Getting the best value 
  * Reduced energy costs
  * Removing humidity properly 


Interested in learning more? Visit [ENERGY STAR](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-room-air-conditioners/results "ENERGY STAR Room Air Conditioners") for details on certified window air conditioner units. 
Window Air Conditioner Sizing Chart — Choose the Right Size  
---  
**Area  
(sq ft)** |  **Capacity  
(BTUs)** |  **Area  
(sq ft)** |  **Capacity  
(BTUs)** |  **Area  
(sq ft)** |  **Capacity  
(BTUs)**  
110-150  |  5,000  |  350-400  |  9,000  |  700-1,000  |  18,000   
150-250  |  6,000  |  400-450  |  10,000  |  1,000-1,200  |  21,000   
250-300  |  7,000  |  450-550  |  12,000  |  1,200-1,400  |  23,000   
300-350  |  8,000  |  550-700  |  14,000  |  1,400-1,500  |  24,000   
###  Other Energy Efficiency Incentives 
We also offer rebates for the following equipment that can improve energy efficiency in your home: 
  * [Air Conditioning Systems](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/ac "Air Conditioning Systems")
  * [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/hp-water-heater "Heat Pump Water Heaters")
  * [Pool Pumps](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/appliances-and-equipment/pool-pump "Pool Pumps")
  * [Power Partner Thermostats](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/cooling-and-heating/pp-thermostat)
  * [Solar Screens](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential/offerings/home-improvements/solar-screens)


Austin Energy provides a $50 rebate on a new qualifying ENERGY STAR window air conditioner. To identify qualifying window unit air conditioners, [visit ENERGY STAR's Find and Compare Products](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-room-air-conditioners/ "Visit ENERGY STAR's Find and Compare Products"). 
**Prerequisites**
  * You must receive electricity from Austin Energy. 
  * You must purchase a new [qualifying ENERGY STAR window air conditioning unit](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-room-air-conditioners/results "qualifying ENERGY STAR window air conditioner"). 
  * You must submit your application within 90 days of purchase. Applications submitted beyond this time frame will not be approved. 


###  Rebate Recipient Eligibility Requirements 
  * Property owners or electric account holders that purchased and installed the equipment are eligible to receive the rebates. 
  * By default, the rebate payment is directed to the customer listed on the Austin Energy electric account. The rebate may also be directed to one of the below parties if all requirements are met. 
    * The property owner, verified using county tax records. 
    * A tenant at the property if the tenant purchased the unit. 


###  Buy a Qualified Window Air Conditioner 
Buy a new ENERGY STAR window air conditioning unit. ENERGY STAR has a [list of qualified window air conditioners](https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-room-air-conditioners/ "list of qualified window air conditioners"). 
###  Apply for Your Rebate Online 
You must submit your rebate application online within 90 days of purchase. Applications submitted after this timeframe will not be approved. The following information is required for your online rebate application: 
  * Active Austin Energy Customer Account Number 
  * Tax Assessor Property ID 
  * Sq ft of area to be cooled 
  * Manufacturer 
  * Model 
  * BTUs 
  * EER 
  * Receipt for new unit 


#### Apply for a Rebate Online
You can apply for your rebate online once you purchase your window air conditioner.
[Apply Online](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#enrollment/default?programId=4&cm_sp=EEC-AEP-_-Application-_-null)
#### Check Your Rebate Status
Use the confirmation (enrollment) and utility account numbers to check the status of your rebate application.
[Check Status](https://rebates.austinenergy.com/OnlineApp/#status/statuscheck?programId=4)
####  Tips for Applying Online 
  * Before you submit the application, you will need to have all required information on hand. 
  * If your application requires supporting documentation, such as invoices or sales receipts, you will need to scan or photograph these documents and upload into the application system. The system will accept any of the following file formats: 
    * Adobe Acrobat PDF (.pdf) 
    * Microsoft Word Document (.doc or .docx) 
    * JPEG (.jpg) 
    * ZIP (.zip) 
  * Check your rebate status online using the confirmation (enrollment) number you receive after the application submission. You will also need your City of Austin utility account number. 


Please email the Austin Energy Appliance Efficiency Program if you have questions about your rebate status or need help with your rebate application. 
#### Disclaimer
Funding is limited and available only to Austin Energy customers on a first-come, first-served basis. Offerings are subject to change without notice. Rebates are not guaranteed until after Austin Energy's review and approval of the rebate application. Program guidelines include additional requirements and limitations for receiving the above rebates. Contact us for more details.
Date last reviewed or modified: 05/14/2024

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。

Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Get Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products
## Limited-time discounts currently available at more than 50 participating locations.

#### Residential

### Questions?
Rebates and Incentives
  

![Get Instant Savings on Energy-Efficient Products](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/Res-Get-Instant-Savings-on-Energy-Efficient-Products.jpg?rev=aecd7842142342ca89f5210533fabe40&w=780&hash=F5A6BE8E96456D18B7324448A6F5F4C8)
Save on industry-leading products to improve the energy-efficiency and comfort of your home.
**Enjoy Three Ways to Save:**
![for a limited time only, instant savings on select energy efficient products brought to you by Austin Energy](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/Savings/Residential/Learn/NewSpurLabel.jpg?h=auto&w=300&rev=f4482b7bb8234c70a56da5b72f480d9f&hash=00D47D8CA443476794CD67A2331D731B)
  1. Get instant savings on select products shipped directly to your home when you [buy online](https://austinenergy.clearesult.com/).
  2. Get instant savings at participating stores when you buy products marked with the green Instant Savings tag.
  3. Get coupons for larger savings on smart thermostats and appliances. Scan the Instant Savings QR codes in-store or [visit the coupon site](https://austinenergy.clearesult.com?utm_source=client&utm_medium=homeclick) to view the products below in more detail. This site provides Austin Energy customer verification and a unique coupon.


**Shopping Tips:**
  * Not all store locations participate in Instant Savings. Verify that the specific store near you is participating before planning a trip.
  * Product availability is limited and available only to Austin Energy customers on a first-come, first-served basis. Discounts are subject to change without notice. Check with stores for availability.


### Appliances
  * ENERGY STAR Dryers ($100 off)![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
[Get retail coupon here](https://austinenergy.clearesult.com/energy-star-electric-clothes-dryers?utm_source=client&utm_medium=dryersclick)
ENERGY STAR clothes dryers save energy by using automatic termination to help detect when your clothes are dry. This feature also prevents wear and tear on your clothes from over-drying.

  * Windows & Doors![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * Door seal top and sides B7 packs for exterior door – seal your doors against drafts and leaks
    * Door seal bottom sweeps for exterior door – seal your doors against drafts and leaks
    * Heat control light window film – reduce solar heat gain, UV damage, and glare while still letting natural light in your home
    * Insulated (black out) curtains - recommended for east and west windows to block summer heat gain
    * Window AC weatherstrip foam tape - foam tape used around windows units to prevent air, dust, dirt, and moisture from getting inside the structure and can prevent air-conditioned or heated air from escaping (April – October)
    * Window /Door Caulk/Silicone - Sealing air leaks around your home and adding insulation can help your home be more comfortable and energy efficient and provide up to a 10% savings on your annual energy bills
    * Window film roll – properly installed window film can reduce the sun's heat coming through your windows, to help make your home bright and comfortable, all day long

  * More DIY Products![right arrow](https://savings.austinenergy.com/-/media/themes/websites/savings/savings/images/rightArrowGrey.png)
    * Bathroom exhaust fan timers – exhaust fans are beneficial in ventilating bathroom air and also reduce the risk of mold/mildew however they should be turned off within approximately 20 minutes
    * Water hose timers (February-October) – can be programmed to run once or multiple times a day to save time and conserve water
    * Water pipe insulation - it's estimated that insulating your water supply pipes reduces two to four degrees Fahrenheit of heat loss
